name: American Defense News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkr4mi2dg8aej7bt4u7b04gvvk70dugc94n5s0p8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66p72clh2bs) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z26vkicsm9000tsi7f641h1nglt9b8uvksfc9s48_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66p72clh2bs) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk8brm7dtsjgg5ji3fvktmd7iju8uln6vs46as9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66p72clh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjn9ad87j8hpvb87c38b309ld8j4h2o5nl5kkdk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66p72clh2bs)

subject: ACT NOW: We Need Your Address to Shield Your Wealth From Impending Doom!
body:
This is NOT a drill, America. This is Christopher Coyne from Lear Capital, and we're in a crucial phase.

Dear Friend,
This is NOT a drill, America. This is **Christopher Coyne** from Lear Capital, and we're in a **crucial phase**.
You've heard our warnings, our urgent calls to action.
The financial hurricane we feared? It's not looming on the horizon any longer - **it's HERE, ripping through the fabric of our economy.**
We're talking about a **significant challenge** threatening **our hard-earned wealth!**
We saw this coming, and so we prepared our [**2023 Wealth Survival Guide**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh436ga0aq4gporkfiuhsetfmhqm5nbg2hcat3a8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66o36cph2bs). This wasn't a contingency - it was a **grim necessity**. This guide isn't available for sale anywhere - Amazon, eBay, you name it, they don't have it. Why? name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zumebfndgnelp6jdfs8g2forsjmf2gnt9p8msk4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66o36c5h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu63prem42b2i64k4gflvbjl7t8hib1lla7c380g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66o36c5h2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjrjnhm85uihji6qbc9ev3gmdpfnab9e90j4v2ho_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66o36c5h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqo9quoi67gd2qe1u4d386rccfu4d7ts0121bro8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5h66o36c5h2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662538%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZNT955ZvIxSgy%2f2en%2bX%2bXA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662539%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xiDZEcvm6oTYKe%2byeQ1e3A&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662530%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bLapBiFvQhJEU4c7heSB6w&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662531%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QHi%2f86uBiXCs%2b2jat6eE2A&sysid=1)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your World Orca Day donation record: Incomplete
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We REALLY hoped we'd never have to send this email, Friend, but our worst-case scenario came true: **We are short of our World Orca Day fundraising goal** , and we need your support to reach this crucial milestone.

We can't accept this shortfall, not now. **The last 75 Southern Resident orcas are endangered and suffering** , and Big Polluters are still destroying our planet for private profit. With so much at stake, we are EXTENDING our World Orca Day matching gift opportunity. A generous group of donors will still match your gift up to our $90,000 goal -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. Here's where your record stands: | | ⚠️ **Incomplete Donation Record**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com** **ORCA DAY DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878030?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 5 MORE**
---
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878031?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Extension expires 11:59 p.m._
---
This isn't about pride or proving a point. We set our $90,000 goal because that's what it takes to secure the survival of our planet. Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect orcas, our waterways, and our planet. And every single dollar has a job to do -- a job that gets infinitely harder if we don't close this budget gap.

Because here's the thing, Friend: **Falling short means cutting back on our work** \-- and the planet can't afford that. That's why this giving extension is so critical. We fight as hard as we can every day, but that fight is fueled by you. That means when we set these goals, we're counting on you to step up. Endangered Southern Resident orcas and the planet are counting on you.

Time is running out for this giving opportunity – and for our planet. So please -- don't wait a moment longer, because the Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more. **We only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, so please:** **[Rush your $27 membership donation now and double your impact to protect orcas and save the Earth!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878032?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878033?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: “Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **" Amazon Loophole" could hand you $28,544 in "royalty" payouts** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24e58ec0720f432b856e8f6fbfde1c8f&_e=zcMkZ8LRn_q4Pta2QnTaDfNLvUWEj_Xj6rTfHVBBGt5N-jyNPja3w8OBYM7Ybcruov_SQBUoqQv5TYFD1Pnt2DjuQNMAApkrglPf5Ud2dT6UVT5SdOFO20nn4Kj8JZHEiGdeNl9-NTXSjNshTM9X4SMHIC9qqUl_Ki7GdLF2yEV1LjihQKVPvRV1gdtrbVS4-dpPIsJ_khsiamkJdp8jstXOCK8RL1ibJEzp7d3rtEPLUhbo1BGMY5AVclIv6JfTu2Dx9uEvvyK4Q_B_NzzRZIB8Y3fgLrVs_eb7GqNNFJw%3D) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the "Amazon secret royalty program..." And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It's available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. **[Watch short video now.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24e58ec0720f432b856e8f6fbfde1c8f&_e=zcMkZ8LRn_q4Pta2QnTaDfNLvUWEj_Xj6rTfHVBBGt5N-jyNPja3w8OBYM7Ybcruov_SQBUoqQv5TYFD1Pnt2DjuQNMAApkrglPf5Ud2dT6UVT5SdOFO20nn4Kj8JZHEiGdeNl9-NTXSjNshTM9X4SlTS1DH0jbowFmLq2Zy0x8i67b2RdJP5ynYtubRDfMxYxDIDL6yEx09t_iq50hxKSm7iGjhII_7chLyMVS6WuHi0znHx1tLQd2k9n67cFk4WqTlTwmQeYL76Fkc9yFm9Ts5q7ch2RPLJ2uq03O7894%3D)**

subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7K8qud14RY_nh4rrHoOgm_yZAYgf-MoQ2Nl23Jje8xnTlVJjS1frGpWHO_wgJJZ-qm3jCRjqIF7qKgoTBxgfTRXPelLgcjoaGZwdgfnIVJf3yEUZmUREcnCzPpaXUC3b4k3FvsxYQWoUgXBUGDobx3FA%3D%3D "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7K5zNY2OzbtsGo-0Xck5kjBVipriGRPJr2VjGhlgHlUDjF0_DplTn6wscjUUVGZTAuLU177QhSXAfm3Lstbd4DWfxJ0K5L5EeRtHLp3Pyln8EptKAylK3z7L_sKF1EMuHlgHaxWzrHHS5VDaHxZQJJ4w%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7KTrHomeBjXks2cC2EIZZ2WB6oJ0VTZrg5bq-9WeYYSGew5liGx6-I2DXu2O49sGScuUZ2Leozwl0J8eTJNWgV6AQ5QQRpgge16XlRWrjjYCNXSDAOtWYUx45s-xlsy-Y_XZtkEd5_7JrNu9MUWqXhuA%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7KzO3CFrsvIfjXSccsj0h4u4ZARggLHpXyFaXpCv_41Ze3sMksHkU5gbJRZEdxoVIQOE0uHlOjZgdDs9qm2K5R2uwwAQFefrUQotakE8eFhzVzYsD5WwvodQE8TzXfRt_H-0tEmCElCUYrSgrf7_2H3g%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7Ky27umMapCRGS1I-y8Wo098b4UUIaB8UubpXtC0MRB816jJEQZve3wUCHESUSk5ZBOmht19fiEosiNlGGcWKjPFwyKnx_WqHangfLi7pF1nqOwy5DRVBc_r-pGnhCNiyhuD0nu8rOytiQzDvooUwNbQ%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7KhhYjF4WYIzzPNfMzR4rMyoRB10ZmMfgGwHyPGS4D8kFVh6RvfegpG3NbZsNJrmmAHUdzlzLUVdFhXsMDfJOWyj1zfZ73nqUFp37hokWHV4EHoVeGRUXFivJPMpKovYWoSmAL6fluhl-J7RIDy3H_NA%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=670d60dbef9447faa77e49ea74ec6207&_e=aqlWLj6VuWnqlHnya8Oyh1oxez-FRFj0xUjoJ7aNL5-jaIUP7myQ3z-Q8h8F0PAwyfbcXYpMRzenzMvQWFeSqzB5q5VFld-pU8uDa3cthEygKGbYKJEHYBKqRyGosEo09M8SU0_mLPnyUY6k23NA40Es-HEIR5xSdedggBBjrUbw4Z5gRIvuQOZqCltBbgGNbY0PVB7wKUo_kMv4_k4KsBxYskcedQvio3WzKwH9Cn31loBkGZPxklUWy4dvKJm6kiK5zovVZUnvRFOhQV4AGvMfS5SC6g9aHxK9hCqDI7jQVRDDyw0vvUGGEpNFZ-7K2mNH_RVqPzJY4uPxEDZfryMp6QWZDuryd9ukuyJt3kcgZo5xz_WT1GeH-JusJmMjxPtA66ylueBWMkOqXGNWwAUMUlo7YNvtc70pcJ-D8bEKHSRBgL1Rm_exPdWslIxlz7O9Fd9-CRzzhjnYG4KkTg%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?

clean_body: This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it's Kellyanne... "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
God saved my life on that one fateful day

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89774c7fbcc041988fca722859ee2193&_e=_ofKsq2BEYpBx3vkMa0Eq5jcQgahwvwR_pUQL2JtklGXie2iyUdys-UsrCkg2X4gVLZeNVoSSAO3fIJd2BOivdsy1wi7fRLklMDeg5YQv09H9YftAtSdoLFatmRa_AHsnvNdnA_7fOT0XwdFlL-9sSiLsiXVBcrrjlOUcdkuwgs4VgjCw_wjgM1cV60nukzpGovowkF4Lt01jKKwkXtfFqOXbIQ2LhO7W9YwXMhd3GEVDaElyCp5uHDhbGjbk9aR0ZLeIDO3vPJmisOFUiNNSOpKscU_evmVLeUKX97mT6R6W2ipUmFFYM9gyF8sUao3wiz-DrHeFyakdemC-ImdX1U-9TDBR60FSQ1o1TZLdoJMoDYMyO3nN3t_dDU30NFJTMBxDZXntyfLwx2UB68pkygJtL3VxQeaYXhXFMK3s7S8Zh9hHqj0g0jcosDqb6FG)
---
| | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89774c7fbcc041988fca722859ee2193&_e=_ofKsq2BEYpBx3vkMa0Eq5jcQgahwvwR_pUQL2JtklGXie2iyUdys-UsrCkg2X4gVLZeNVoSSAO3fIJd2BOivdsy1wi7fRLklMDeg5YQv09H9YftAtSdoLFatmRa_AHsnvNdnA_7fOT0XwdFlL-9sSiLsiXVBcrrjlOUcdkuwgs4VgjCw_wjgM1cV60nukzpGovowkF4Lt01jKKwkXtfFqOXbIQ2LhO7W9YwXMhd3GEVDaElyCp5uHDhbGjbk9aR0ZLeIDO3vPJmisOFUiNNSOpKscU_evmVLeUKX97mT6Q5ZiVCkGwiiQWougDyMmtYM7HKfgDShoJA9EB0FKhYWWpVAgR2ZegLIrLOx0ZDkn3E3F4S7cYkE33aNW9XyieC5GO_uGBnCXNXXLQBQVYJta6_6PEbvz1JSrjZLwHRWbLGGCTB8ZiT4vEhL5_CEJxk)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...

subject: What's going on this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I've got good news and bad news

|

---
| | | Patriot,

My team set an ambitious goal for this week: **_[100 donors from every state.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958484:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "100 donors from
every state.")_**

Yesterday we had a meeting to go over the numbers and I've got good news and bad news.

The bad news is that we still need 8 more donors from your state to knock this goal out of the park.

**_The good news? All it takes is a gift to help.
_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958485:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "CHIP IN $1")
---
|
---

I know I've been able to count on your help in the past, which is why I knew you would be a good person for me to ask for help again.

**_[If you can, would you chip in any amount to help me hit my weekly goal?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958485:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "If you can, would
you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?")_** It's not easy to fund a campaign and I won't be able to do this without you.

Thank you for your commitment to Team Tim Scott and to our mission of restoring Faith in America.

God Bless,

Tim
---
* * *
---
| |
---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958486:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958486:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "STAND
WITH ME")
---

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62958486:JdqIBVIJN:m:1:3299561967:19BA6185D1B029189F61DDBDA5894D5E:r "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

Thank You & God Bless
- Tim Scott

"If you can, would you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?" It's not easy to fund a campaign and I won't be able to do this without you. Thank you for your commitment to Team Tim Scott and to our mission of restoring Faith in America. God Bless, Tim | | If you 're able-bodied, you work. If you take out a loan, you pay it back. And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail. America needs more victors and less victims. These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them. "If you agree, will you join my team?" | | | "STAND WITH ME" Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country. I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy. "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?"** Thank You & God Bless - Tim Scott | | | "STAND WITH ME" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA 7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312 North Charleston, SC 29406 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 25, 2021. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Remember Joe Rogan?
body:
Rogan recently hosted Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., an outspoken anti-vaxxer and petri dish of misinformation.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)
**Remember Joe Rogan, Peter?** He gave us a shout-out earlier this year because of our mission to hold misinformation engines like him accountable:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230715?refcode=em20230715&amount=5&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)
Well, Rogan’s at it again. He recently had Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. (an outspoken anti-vaxxer and petri dish of misinformation) on his podcast to promote his campaign for president — and it went pretty much exactly how you’d expect.
[**Before we go further, you should know that Courier and our affiliated newsrooms in 8 battleground states are working around the clock to hold bad actors like Rogan and Kennedy accountable, debunk their false claims, and deliver fact-based reporting to the communities that need it most. Can you pitch in $5 now to support our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230715?refcode=em20230715&amount=5&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230715?refcode=em20230715&amount=5&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)**
**RFK Jr.’s strategy is straight out of the COVID misinformation playbook** : He’s not making appearances in the mainstream media and he's avoiding any interactions with real journalists who might ask hard questions and hold him accountable.
Instead, he prefers to appear on podcasts hosted by people like Rogan, where he’ll be praised as an “outsider” and a “truth-teller” instead of called out for pushing **dangerous and debunked lies** about vaccines and other issues.
**The scariest part is his strategy is working**. In recent weeks RFK Jr.’s poll numbers have gone up — and the mainstream media is taking notice. They’ve even started to cover his campaign much in the same way they covered Trump in 2016.
Unfortunately, rather than getting the facts to the public and debunking misinformation, this type of profit-driven, sensationalized coverage is likely to help RFK Jr.’s campaign in the end, just as it helped Trump’s.
**That’s why Courier exists****, Peter**. Our newsrooms across 8 battleground states operate in “news deserts” that lack other reliable sources of local reporting, so our journalists are dedicated to picking up the mainstream media’s slack and calling misinformation out for what it is.
[**But it takes a lot of resources to support our newsrooms, and we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up. So if you can, please pitch in $5 or any amount today to help us continue fighting back against misinformation.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230715?refcode=em20230715&amount=5&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230715?refcode=em20230715&amount=5&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)**
Thanks,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1239_120351_n4PMCE&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1239%2E120351%2En4PMCE)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

clean_body: I need you to get involved in this race STAT | | I have a critical mission for you, Fellow Conservative. Combat veteran, Navy SEAL, and Bronze Star recipient Tim Sheehy just launched his campaign for U.S. Senate in Montana. Democrats are terrified of Tim. They're already attacking him, and he needs our help to respond ASAP. Fellow Conservative, this race is make or break for Republicans. If Tim wins, odds are we take back the majority. Simply put, I need Tim Sheehy with me in the Senate. He's a husband, father, fellow combat veteran, and entrepreneur. He shares Montana's values and will always put America first. And he's a tough conservative who won't let Montana down in the Senate. The Senate majority is at stake. In service, Tom Cotton P.S. Every single day, Biden's administration pushes an agenda that threatens our freedoms, weakens our economy, and compromises our national security.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

| | | Friend,

I want to share with you why my heart is so heavy over future of our country.

We've all felt firsthand the **damaging impact** of Joe Biden's policies.

Every single day, Biden's administration pushes an agenda that **threatens our freedoms, weakens our economy, **and** compromises our national security.**

Biden's **reckless immigration policies** have created an **absolute disaster at our southern border.**

Drugs are **pouring in** , human trafficking is **rampant** , and communities are **suffering**.

We need a President who will **fight for strong border security, protect our citizens **and** uphold the rule of law.**

**_That 's why I was left with no choice but to introduce articles of impeachment against Joe Biden last month._**

| But it doesn't stop at the border.

Biden's **assault on our Second Amendment **rights has been lethal.

He's **trampled on the Constitution** , ignored the rights of law-abiding citizens, and jeopardized our long-standing traditions of freedom and self-defense.

Under Biden's leadership, our **government has grown** out of control.

He's drowning us in **burdensome regulations** and **reckless spending** , betraying the principles of limited government that our founding fathers set forth.

It's time **someone took a stand** and say ENOUGH is ENOUGH.

Now, more than ever, **I need your support to fight back against Biden's dangerous agenda**.

[**Pitch in anything you can to help us HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50b14b5d65b14706985fc6a05458ce81&_e=YSSj-b16yVWNAW8GJdl8P1EEM5uWS56vzwNMdrF8lFAaTNS0RF4pndzNiSbS0cPjDIahe9gkl0ZlVJDnINIAwh-O8ZJiLjS7ojbCg0XvqfPRpwdQvtVlEFRDGWh8O_lSxT9-vZFWn7PgzGpDYOxYlnxzLddksF--3_BRinIDQgfH9cot1gyLwnospHPmO2S43okeLqzdZAXHo2il0KgHJlqL-qzVO3MwO8UBnkp3veEzNpkxyTH-zIshvhVV90jI9SOV3Eb7mCSqnc6LRMci77tOa45PhTKSbAxAAKnPU7Zzo_fF8YJO3YZeYAMdIoGo)

Your money goes towards **amplifying our voice in Congress, mobilizing grassroots efforts **and **countering Biden 's assault on our values.**

By [donating today](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50b14b5d65b14706985fc6a05458ce81&_e=YSSj-b16yVWNAW8GJdl8P1EEM5uWS56vzwNMdrF8lFAaTNS0RF4pndzNiSbS0cPjDIahe9gkl0ZlVJDnINIAwh-O8ZJiLjS7ojbCg0XvqfPRpwdQvtVlEFRDGWh8O_lSxT9-vZFWn7PgzGpDYOxYlqX0bwMxPbZcBXt54zkFIwS8JcnMl9gUOsWw3Icohlgdoz9MM7rqI_UHc2CuxJDDXgukq2tmlDpkVuwzPz391Ogt6bj-yWOQjGDY_cbOb8bXTsY-DddsCIx85GM28Z_rQQnNLc2ijDlgFwuRIBNjD0v9ixNxs3tNZKJLe1Q4zApy), you can help us defend our conservative principles, advocate for limited government, and protect the hardworking Americans who make this country great.

Together, we can make sure our voices are heard and secure a future of freedom and prosperity for generations to come.

body:
God saved my life on that one fateful day

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6b9828c14f542a99fa04614bf5b8b07&_e=2OYgIN5rhItU39DCjeEHnIrbpMcahjeo_lFg7Ji92oHCoqHAy1Rhk9UYInipCtGYjrVxZsl6hqC0JLNpKoHv8uDETH7IafWbkz-peJpahqSIYwOmGgU3gGIhL3argvP-lT-waW6HM9c1CZvNoOEy_5WZWGTne_iB-dtLq5o6MoOBSSfpFWojPfsxxGA3_baG3MLmTM7_rdVC5yBkLyoIwqWENvENawZbrmiSRkrA6HyQ4kNglZ8HArZm1482KOVvHCKq3DfUSvrPb2Y3V16saTGDBqK22i9McjzB4-vXyu5xD_pamGnx-RE5zJjrnMDVYYcW0TEUg5vMBqYaqEtihpOjQ7lGrBLUDYuI0nl_TIraU5evIdNfY8Szm1heORM4Gd5G3Kaplz0icqcOcOrKGZSa1H0kw8QIfPtZF23dhoZRS_jWCk_K8AcVGKeey5cg)

| | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a6b9828c14f542a99fa04614bf5b8b07&_e=2OYgIN5rhItU39DCjeEHnIrbpMcahjeo_lFg7Ji92oHCoqHAy1Rhk9UYInipCtGYjrVxZsl6hqC0JLNpKoHv8uDETH7IafWbkz-peJpahqSIYwOmGgU3gGIhL3argvP-lT-waW6HM9c1CZvNoOEy_5WZWGTne_iB-dtLq5o6MoOBSSfpFWojPfsxxGA3_baG3MLmTM7_rdVC5yBkLyoIwqWENvENawZbrmiSRkrA6HyQ4kNglZ8HArZm1482KOVvHCKq3DfUSvrPb2Y3V16saTGDBqK22i9McjzB4-vXyu7OI1YH7TxvoEXbzNYtzV2oo3CAf8Ij3d7y5apXdYULNePtsUPCgsHtNv_OOZgd-pimGwpf6DErQ75rWAGzhsAfsEW5rXJxZl4a8z60f8dCl9_EbZJ7yxoBrrLfTdFfjoehYcADT3swAIejamTtzOWn)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big news in the fight against Big Tech
body:
I need you to read these exchanges, friend.

| |
---
| | I need you to read these exchanges, friend.
---
_" Cannot stress the degree to which this needs to be resolved immediately. Please remove this account immediately."_ _ __" We want to make sure YouTube has a handle on vaccine hesitancy and is working toward making the problem better. Noted that vaccine hesitancy was a concern. That is shared by the highest ('and I mean the highest') levels of the White House."_ _ __ "Not to sound like a broken record, but how much content is being demoted, and how effective are you at mitigating reach and how quickly?"_ _ __ "Hey folks, wanted to flag the below tweet and am wondering if we can get moving on the process of having it removed. ASAP"_
---
These are all messages White House officials sent to Big Tech employees that have now come to light because of the _Missouri v. Biden_ case making national headlines - and I needed you to see this with your own eyes. The collusion between Big Tech Big Government runs even deeper than we previously knew - and we need your help to put an end to it once for all. **[Will you give a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today, and help us protect free speech from Big Government?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e6716ca98af4793ae46561ae79ee05a&_e=02-JIT4HZo6p8KvwRWmZV8Avith-X9N6FLcZKAUVR8Fa5l7fQxoE9VrY0caPOIurS6VqnDKi5ZEG6JpLtjfaXNyZSDnmlIjNRUH8mfxSXNXdcVLaB9D4MNI4W6yZR59YaVDFsm5lKxVk3mpQ8tFWX2oJR17Rkdn9vHULNzVogsKXRmaP6Sumgcx4oKgHVcRjj0a8HsQj__gyPpxPfVduGkvk1XG0tFX7VHmMh0KHoVdsG_8CeLvTFmCZA_kBGUP7UtGHpKOO-mGohA4ahjv5Mx5HS6jDTxVKrVgOiWI1LIWQvzRqiq423MemO-30-z-PpR_5qw-WGh-_6FZjMoctNnSuyCd65lLbxCodV3MZ5a8%3D)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I'm the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty--non-profit law firm dedicated to defending the freedom of speech, civil liberties, and fighting back against government overreach. Thanks to patriotic Americans like you, we're currently suing Twitter and the state of California for their unconstitutional collusion to censor the political speech of political opponents. Rogan O'Handley (known to some by his social media name "DC_Draino") found himself in the crosshairs of this collusion when the State of California leveraged its power to force Twitter to remove Rogan's tweets calling for an audit of the 2020 election. The bad news is that the collusion is even worse than we knew when we filed Rogan's case. **But the good news is that a federal judge recognized these threats to our free speech and enjoined numerous federal agencies from colluding with social media platforms to censor Americans ' speech. ** This is huge. _This federal judge even cited our lawsuit, O 'Handley v. Weber, where we are suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State's office over a factually similar circumstance._ The momentum is on our side, {\var:first_name Friend} -- and we need to take full advantage. **[Will you make a generous, one-time donation of $35 or more right away as we prepare our case for the Supreme Court?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e6716ca98af4793ae46561ae79ee05a&_e=02-JIT4HZo6p8KvwRWmZV8Avith-X9N6FLcZKAUVR8Fa5l7fQxoE9VrY0caPOIurS6VqnDKi5ZEG6JpLtjfaXNyZSDnmlIjNRUH8mfxSXNXdcVLaB9D4MNI4W6yZR59YaVDFsm5lKxVk3mpQ8tFWX2oJR17Rkdn9vHULNzVogsKXRmaP6Sumgcx4oKgHVcRjj0a8HsQj__gyPpxPfVduGltaDNkc8F4nROoM5Tz3-aZyj4R3IQtxTILx0FPBWdCPusJSI_SUrfpmPGHUWMlEi7JTp6gRVPBPlZAFOC1nS1cuDWJnP4DInnkUtAHcg5f9A4pP8dc59Fcvh0tOsvsfUqmms9PdeGP_EuY5cefGAPA%3D)** As you may have heard, in Rogan's case we recently filed a petition for certiorari at the Supreme Court of the United States. This is the perfect time for the Court to hear Rogan's case challenging Big Government and Big Tech's collusion to censor conservatives online. And while Judge Doughty's decision is only a preliminary injunction, it's one of the strongest signals we've seen in favor of free speech. This is an incredible step in the right direction, and what I hope will be one of many victories for First Amendment rights.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---

body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0d9af2a-956b-4002-809c-a1c3e9b28245/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | Peter, Our communities are in grave danger as the number of states allowing permitless carry of weapons continues to rise. With no permits, safety training, or background checks required, anyone can carry a loaded gun without scrutiny. This is an alarming trend that puts lives at risk. Florida has now joined the ranks of states allowing permitless carry, making it the 26th state to embrace this dangerous practice. But let's not forget the devastating consequences: states that have implemented permitless carry laws have seen a significant increase in violence and death rates. [We need to take a stand. Will you join us and oppose permitless carry laws? Add your name with ours →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c007635-e480-4651-b77c-b1a6c6383e56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbacd5a82-ab84-4884-a0f4-599384452d29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Research has revealed the grim reality: weakening public carry laws correlates with a 13-15% rise in violent crime rates and an 11% increase in homicides committed with handguns. This is not a protected right; it's an epidemic that threatens our safety. If we require permits and training to operate a vehicle, shouldn't we demand the same for carrying a lethal weapon? This is common sense, and even many responsible gun owners agree. [Join us and sign the petition to send a clear message: we oppose permitless carry of weapons and demand responsible gun laws that prioritize public safety.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T753bfcba-69c2-4abc-9703-bfcbd4c5a074/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7cd7528-8205-4568-8dcb-b7c22e84a2b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why are some things so much more expensive? Update from Mississippi’s free market advocacy organization
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570896?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**I recently came across an old McDonald’s menu from the early 2000s. A Quarter Pounder cost $2.29. A regular shake $1.69. Large fries $1.59.**

Today, you would need to pay about twice that. Two decades of inflation – particularly in the past three years - means that a dollar buys much less than it did back then.

**We are all familiar with the idea that prices rise over time.** Ever since the US Federal Reserve broke the link between the US dollar and gold in August 1971, inflation has become a permanent part of life.

Given that the purchasing power of a dollar is constantly declining, it often seems as if the cost of things are rising even when they are falling. When you measure price changes in constant dollar amounts (what economists call “real terms”), or if you look at the cost of items in terms of how long it might take someone on the median income to earn enough to pay for it, we get a much more accurate picture of how prices have changed.
---
|
---
| **The chart above from Visual Capitalist shows how the price of various consumer items has changed since the start of the century. **

**US households get a far better deal when they buy toys, televisions or cellular services than was the case twenty years ago.** The price of TVs in real terms has plummeted. A large flat screen TV in 2000, according to VisualCapitalist, cost about 17 percent of median income. Today? Less than 1 percent of (a much higher) median income.

That’s the good news, but the bad news is that the price of other items has skyrocketed whichever way you measure it. **Over the past two decades the price of hospital services has risen over 200 percent. College tuition is up almost 170 percent.**

**Why have the costs of some things fallen so dramatically, but the costs of others risen?**

**Anyone wanting to sell you cellular services, or a TV, or toys in America today is operating in a fiercely competitive market.** They are under constant pressure to give customers a good deal.

At the same time, companies in those sectors often operate globally, meaning that they benefit from the advantages of international trade, and can then pass those gains on to their customers.

**What about the healthcare economy or higher education? There simply aren’t the incentives on providers in those sectors to give customers a better deal.**

Not only is there less competition in these sectors, but they are protected by government regulation and barriers to entry that intentionally keep out the competition.

Here in Mississippi, for example, in order to provide a new healthcare facility, a provider will usually have to get a permit – called a Certificate of Need. Since these permits usually require the approval of existing healthcare providers, they are notoriously difficult to obtain.

Prices are determined via costly negotiations with insurance companies, rather than by pressure to keep giving customers a better deal.

**A good rule of thumb is that prices have fallen whenever there is choice and competition, and government regulation is limited. Where there is lots of government regulation, prices have soared.**

No one in Washington, as far as I know, has yet come up with a plan to make televisions or toys more affordable. Yet that is what the current administration is proposing to do for healthcare and higher education when they propose more Medicaid and student loan cancellation.

**Ironic, isn’t it? Having made healthcare and higher education insanely expensive through regulation, government then comes along with an offer to make them more affordable to some. **

What we ought to do instead is to abolish Certificate of Need laws and incentivize providers to offer customers, not just insurance companies, a better deal.

**Rules on university tenure need to go, so that instead of running colleges for the convenience of those on the payroll, they are run in the best interests of those that save desperately in order to be able to afford to graduate.** We also need to change the law on university accreditation so that there is less box ticking about diversity and inclusion, and more emphasis on how a degree actually adds value for students.

**If there was a free market in healthcare and higher education, the cost of both would come down. If we don’t deregulate either sector, prices will continue to rise.**

**Ps. Talking of excessive regulation keeping out the competition, I was dismayed to hear that this week the Mississippi Charter School Authorizer Board only approved a single new Charter School in 2023. **

This means that a decade since Charter Schools were allowed under Mississippi law, we have a grand total of eight. Our Authorizer Board has been cheerfully rejecting more applications than it has approved to the point that I think it is a minor miracle that anyone bothers to apply at all.

**If Mississippi had an Authorizer Board for fast food outlets, McDonald’s Quarter Pounders would be an expensive luxury.** The only way our state will see a significant increase in Charter Schools is if we actually appoint people to run the Authorizer Board that believe in school choice.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5349f195d8&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|
---

We also need to change the law on university accreditation so that there is less box ticking about diversity and inclusion, and more emphasis on how a degree actually adds value for students. If there was a free market in healthcare and higher education, the cost of both would come down. If we don’t deregulate either sector, prices will continue to rise. Ps. Talking of excessive regulation keeping out the competition, I was dismayed to hear that this week the Mississippi Charter School Authorizer Board only approved a single new Charter School in 2023. This means that a decade since Charter Schools were allowed under Mississippi law, we have a grand total of eight. Our Authorizer Board has been cheerfully rejecting more applications than it has approved to the point that I think it is a minor miracle that anyone bothers to apply at all. If Mississippi had an Authorizer Board for fast food outlets, McDonald’s Quarter Pounders would be an expensive luxury. The only way our state will see a significant increase in Charter Schools is if we actually appoint people to run the Authorizer Board that believe in school choice. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

Why? Because I upheld my oath of office and held Donald Trump accountable for his many abuses of power.** [**They will never silence me — not now and not ever — but I need your help to fight back. If you can, split an urgent $25 contribution to CommonGood USA and our campaign right now to help us respond to this unprecedented political attack.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66516836/416641201/-968791758?refcode=20230715_CGUSA_AS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI4MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzFmNDM4MjUtMDkyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=asFliuNOpfLvxXAp5byGKFxcYXt8zkpVzYiVu5ovVNI=) We face many pressing challenges as a country — affordable housing, access to health care, creating jobs, and so much more. Instead of addressing any of these challenges, Kevin McCarthy chose to take up this MAGA effort to distract from Donald Trump’s legal problems. They will never stop doing his bidding. We've already known that the GOP is completely unhinged and beholden to Donald Trump. With his call now to imprison me and primary any Republican who didn’t vote to censure me, Trump is telling the entire Republican Party that they must seek retribution against me politically and do whatever they can to prevent me from being elected to the Senate. **This is not just a political stunt to rile up the MAGA base — it’s an attack on all accountability and constitutional oversight.** **But make no mistake: If they thought this was going to deter me from holding Trump and his accomplices accountable or delivering real results for California and our nation, they thought wrong.** I will not stop my fight to put truth and our democracy first — even if it means standing up to a twice-impeached ex-president and his lackeys. [**With Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans ramping up their attacks against me, I’m going to need you by my side more than ever. Will you split a grassroots donation of $25 to help CommonGood USA and me stand up to the GOP’s attacks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66516837/416641202/-968791758?refcode=20230715_CGUSA_AS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI4MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzFmNDM4MjUtMDkyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=asFliuNOpfLvxXAp5byGKFxcYXt8zkpVzYiVu5ovVNI=) MAGA Republicans may have voted to censure me, but I will always use my voice to hold them accountable. No matter what political retribution they throw at me next. Let’s work together to push back against these attacks on our democracy. Thank you, — Adam

body:
I am writing this morning, personally, to ask if you can make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight.
#

Peter -
I am writing this morning, personally, to ask if you can make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight.
This campaign is funded almost exclusively by people chipping-in what they can, when they can. And what I am hoping for today is that people like you will be moved to make their first online donation to my campaign.
So that is why I am turning to you, one more time, to ask if you can do something that will make a real difference in this race.

Peter, this is disturbing.

Megan Rapinoe said she supports _**biological men**_ playing on the field with the U.S. _**Women’s**_ National Team.

This is an all-out assault on women athletes.

Far-Left activist Megan Rapinoe is a hypocrite. Now that she is retiring, she has no skin in the game. But what about future girls aspiring to have the same opportunities Megan had?

Women deserve a place to play. Plain and simple.

We need your help to defend women’s sports, and that starts with you. Your daughter or granddaughter needs your support NOW before it's too late and they are competing against MEN.

We want to know: [**Do you believe biological men should be eligible to play soccer on the US Women’s National Team?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=29d0112d94934ca8874961f3f10c533b&_e=MSoioYIc-TGhYm9EwxtrPuzJJ9rEM-SMgI0I9FE7NC-mEsKn7LJEHALtgrwelng4n0VTGq0gidUjbi2irJqoRi2WL6KOo-aNKwzu5CafykwDcM7JFG_BBiJHTKzr5lmaNZs5wY6G_xYzB3mRRMZjYc6XQnfn4EqhKq6KBMvyZTFIu5ZndYfHdRwXDkjGgdi9km6YYTSHRRrocoLpg2MNVb3RxtdQC-IGOIY6LoW_fxZDEc1qpae-xRMX_dINFelLWvMbwI3f_54Ee72v9UfQ8c1EuxjyKKucRvlA0LhzqZZbRNmJCNxm6LgAewIeiVIwzS5e3rI4x4OsohM8ocif6pdFH9CQFl55NcMW-xIn8yw1aAhEyn1HOYfeRQaN2oak)

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is disturbing. Megan Rapinoe said she supports biological men playing on the field with the U.S. Women’s National Team. This is an all-out assault on women athletes. Far-Left activist Megan Rapinoe is a hypocrite. Now that she is retiring, she has no skin in the game. But what about future girls aspiring to have the same opportunities Megan had? Women deserve a place to play. Plain and simple. We need your help to defend women’s sports, and that starts with you. Your daughter or granddaughter needs your support NOW before it's too late and they are competing against MEN. Montana is the GOP’s top target to flip in 2024. It’s why Mitch McConnell just handpicked an opponent for me who can self-fund his own campaign and be his yes-man in Congress. Millions of dollars are going to flood into the state from his mega-donors and national Republicans who are trying their best to buy Montana’s Senate seat.

So we have to respond fast, and respond right now—especially at this turning point in the campaign. That means we need to hit all of our fundraising targets to have the resources to fight back.

**But folks, I just checked our fundraising numbers, and right now, we need a serious boost in grassroots donations if we’re going to hit our mid-month fundraising goal.**

There’s no question about it. **With just hours until the deadline, we’re cutting it close. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help this morning:**

[_**Can you give $10 this morning between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us close the gap and reach our big fundraising goal so we can grow this campaign and respond to incoming GOP attacks?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66517239/416642307/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230715-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ODE5ODJmLTBlMjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nU3pSzZmZUSW9CZo0m8YXBq4WrtGhb7pIbBRrvIYwiE=)

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership." | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year. We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. "Renew your membership before it’s too late " \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services Subject: We hate to see you go. It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." Millions of dollars are going to flood into the state from his mega-donors and national Republicans who are trying their best to buy Montana’s Senate seat.

So we have to respond fast, and respond right now—especially at this turning point in the campaign. That means we need to hit all of our fundraising targets to have the resources to fight back.

But folks, **I just checked our fundraising numbers, and right now, we need a serious boost in grassroots donations if we’re going to hit our mid-month fundraising goal.**

There’s no question about it. **With less than 15 hours until the deadline, we’re cutting it close. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help this morning:**

clean_body: | = Morning, Peter! Sorry for the early email... between my first major GOP opponent launching their campaign last month to thinking about this week’s mid-month deadline, I wasn’t able to get much sleep last night. So I figured while I was sitting here drinking my coffee, I would update you on where things stand. = | = Montana is the GOP’s top target to flip in 2024. It’s why Mitch McConnell just handpicked an opponent for me who can self-fund his own campaign and be his yes-man in Congress. Millions of dollars are going to flood into the state from his mega-donors and national Republicans who are trying their best to buy Montana’s Senate seat. So we have to respond fast, and respond right now—especially at this turning point in the campaign. That means we need to hit all of our fundraising targets to have the resources to fight back. But folks, I just checked our fundraising numbers, and right now, we need a serious boost in grassroots donations if we’re going to hit our mid-month fundraising goal. There’s no question about it. With less than 15 hours until the deadline, we’re cutting it close. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help this morning: = = Thank you, your support means so much. name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: Face-to-face with death
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown
body:
God saved my life on that one fateful day

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5640114eb7a84f33905306ea55a5e411&_e=lUcDuTgvOLh23bv6DRpm1P24NulZz_U6ruGKbpM1_4_O5H-fwMe0sMgofaOBoi2T0LZ0Y7_LOGr1DhQQO-1fuxzWYxAmAUGcNeyTuYoaAO56shNTH2E_7j1cNkuinMahISieamDM-ZLsceu1ncTKpHV8NsaIDiEUruz9pwISRwOduriwrhcMKmy26b8lRZr_P6xPVadDg-qvePvgpiC8QM1U-bEKvUIcL5A6hWD1iXOIPxGA2295qhUiMiCLwA6yIezPh2blosx4A4eqtaszIVxK8YdawI8Wz2kPP4lOMArZaevx6d6Am3dHY1Y4tPtNE8_UTjpGi73ljXS_9tPWM85Clkvc1Yx1rtDun6KBCxcks8YP_Mx01-7R-erZ8P3NBPnhw3aVlwny1ty7wBwDJc_KgytXdIWNrw8I3Gstu7tzHwhsBkh7w4LH2lzpD-_M)
---
| | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5640114eb7a84f33905306ea55a5e411&_e=lUcDuTgvOLh23bv6DRpm1P24NulZz_U6ruGKbpM1_4_O5H-fwMe0sMgofaOBoi2T0LZ0Y7_LOGr1DhQQO-1fuxzWYxAmAUGcNeyTuYoaAO56shNTH2E_7j1cNkuinMahISieamDM-ZLsceu1ncTKpHV8NsaIDiEUruz9pwISRwOduriwrhcMKmy26b8lRZr_P6xPVadDg-qvePvgpiC8QM1U-bEKvUIcL5A6hWD1iXOIPxGA2295qhUiMiCLwA6yIezPh2blosx4A4eqtaszIVxK8YdawI8Wz2kPP4lOMArSAH886rPWi1eKL6EQ2AFRY47oF6SzGJzflg7jNXgrULOgjBxJs2rho_IGpWIWgcF1gyUaBvis9Hel0qtwWLMMscf_0xgMwXbHjlR20AWodp9pdv7fBUm8muK9PKPDPGO9AtbM6hpxV2qJQzxMgopK)
---
**I stared death in the face and survived.** **_Friend, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson:_** Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I'm alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. clean_body: God saved my life on that one fateful day | | | | | You see, it happened in a split second, Friend -- when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan. My body was instantly engulfed in flames. The pain was unimaginable. I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath. But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me. I stared death in the face and survived. Friend, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor. My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I'm alive today is to serve my country to my last breath. Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.) Republican U.S. Senate Candidate P.S. Democrats have been barely winning every single year for nearly a decade -- and winning in Nevada will be KEY to guaranteeing a Republican majority in the Senate in 2024.**** Please, chip in whatever you can using this | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Team – Let me tell you, it's like watching a game of "Whack-a-Mole" with these anti-democratic schemes being pushed by extreme lawmakers in North Carolina. They keep popping up in different forms, but the goal remains the same: [**to silence the voices of everyday people like you and me. We cannot let them win!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66517540/416643512/360931066?refcode=20230715_AOTL_F_Games_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMGM4MDkxLTBmMjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVBUh2qjamELB4tMf3Pp-rmV2EAfC0JHYPhNLt-P3Eo=)
🌐 The News Observer recently reported how North Carolina is facing a new wave of voter suppression. Extreme lawmakers are pushing restrictive measures that disproportionately impact marginalized communities and make it harder for people to exercise their right to vote. It's as if they're trying to shrink our electorate like a pair of ill-fitting jeans. We cannot let them squeeze the life out of our democracy!
But fear not, team, because we have a secret weapon to combat these unfair tactics: fair maps. By ensuring that districts are drawn fairly and free from gerrymandering, we can create a level playing field where every vote counts.
[**That's why All On The Line is working tirelessly to rally grassroots support from folks like you and advocate for a transparent redistricting process in states like North Carolina and across the nation. Will you make a donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66517541/416643513/360931066?refcode=20230715_AOTL_F_Games_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMGM4MDkxLTBmMjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVBUh2qjamELB4tMf3Pp-rmV2EAfC0JHYPhNLt-P3Eo=)

But fear not, team, because we have a secret weapon to combat these unfair tactics: fair maps. By ensuring that districts are drawn fairly and free from gerrymandering, we can create a level playing field where every vote counts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Your dedication and support are the fuel that powers our movement for fair maps! Let's show those anti-democratic lawmakers that we're not going anywhere! \-- Ted Corcoran Organizing Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
what is equality?
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0rpa28okdv1oirhrsd5dqjnqen6lmqjbip36mq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65spl6jib9cr7c5hbcpb5c5qjat1j6opjct1nc3im2ctlmmrjed30cqom3cdl6qrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3curm2pjlcsqr0pti65j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm1p71c5g62p37c8iv0)

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](https://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2z78ta551kdrn48v6en5dn7jlemvaq1fdc9ojclh8).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp3srrqifj6i4l584iac28ecukjfmn3fsm8j0bro_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5gm0ob4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg) | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpd25cisfl2m01o63ueffhigdiherdng434tr02o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5gm0ob4cth2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhfoslqt9o5gd1ngsnfdblmjr2p2jcgbaqak2dq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5gm0ob4cth2bs)
---
| | In this [**25-page commentary**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlraidp75v294h7v8n9pbn2dcnb2kfvccpbvdv2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5gm0ob4cth2bs), "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of"Created Equal" now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd02hcps02664g1iubdg68ns937r4iq7rtbu8iug_rp22sh2s8i66o74s5gm0ob4cth2bs)** Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: World Orca Day: Here's where we're at
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **FRIEND,** We'll cut right to it. **Yesterday, we fell short of our crucial World Orca Day goal.** But we can't afford to give up on our efforts to save the last Southern Resident orcas, so there's no other choice: **We just extended our matching gift opportunity:** [_**your gift today will be matched dollar for dollar up to our $90,000 goal, but only until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to fight back against Big Oil and Big Shipping, save our orcas and protect our Earth! **_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878376?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **WORLD ORCA DAY GOAL:**** FELL SHORT ** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 3** | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 12 HOURS](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878377?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Here's what we're up against: First, the Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal would cause severe destruction to these orcas' natural habitats and migration routes by bringing in an exponential boom in shipping traffic. **The noise pollution caused by this traffic alone would be devastating to their survival** \-- drowning out their sonar signals and disrupting their ability to communicate, avoid deadly collisions with ships and find the scarce Chinook salmon they depend on for food.

If that wasn't harmful enough, **Big Oil is trying to EXPAND the Trans Mountain Pipeline to carry up to 890,000 barrels per day of the world's dirtiest tar sand oil to massive tankers that would plow through these whales’ delicate homes.** This would mean a **major increased threat of a devastating oil spill banging on the doors** of Southern Resident orcas. Big Oil has proven time and again that they put profit over everything, even vital ecosystems -- and we have to act to stop it now before it’s too late.

**The lives of these whales are hanging by a thread, and each of these projects are poised to push them to total EXTINCTION.** **And beyond that, the ripple effects of Big Shipping and Big Oil's decisions today will cause irreversible damage to the fragile ocean ecosystems that support so much life on our planet.**

**We don't have a second to waste, so please, before our World Orca Day match extension expires at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT:** [_**Will you make a membership donation of $27 or more right now while it can still go towards our $90,000 goal to protect ocean habitats, help suffering orcas recover, and ensure our planet thrives?**_ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878378?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878379?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878380?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878381?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878382?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans & vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
