name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Gaining momentum
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsRdhltDUN

Vivek 2024

As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I
want to foster national pride....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRdhltDUN

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had
never run for office before. I didn't have years of campaigning
under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my
campaign.

I bet most grassroots
conservatives only knew my name from Fox News appearances.

But now, 4 months after
announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am
climbing in the polls - even polling ahead of a former Vice
President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors.

I am proud of the outsider
campaign we are running. In addition to the millions my family
has personally invested, I am counting on folks like YOU to make
sure we have what it takes to continue to build on this momentum!

Can I count on you to step up -
even if it's just $1 or $5?

RUSH $1 →

RUSH $5 →

RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT
→

As the first millennial to run
for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among
young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America
great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the
debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and
these poll numbers are KEY. But I really need help securing new
donors. Fellow American, please help however you can to make sure
we continue to take on the Washington elites.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Coach
subject: Ramping up to DEFEAT THE LEFT in 2024

body:
We have an important deadline at midnight tonight. Respond ASAP >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/556489434d7ba290/01ef95e02c320a48c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Hi there Peter, it’s Coach. I’m glad to reach you today!

I just got out of a meeting with my team. We’re halfway through the year, and we’ve been making great progress as we ramp up to defeat the left in 2024 – but we still have a whole lot of work to do.

**_We’re locked in a battle for the heart and soul of our great nation and your involvement is VITAL to our efforts._**

I’m writing to personally ask for your help as we lay out our plans for the months ahead. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we’re looking for **85 Team Tuberville supporters to step up and pitch in $10 or more.**

**Will you take a stand today for REPUBLICAN VICTORY in 2024?**
---
[**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/556489434d7ba290/f6bb097a5dc3ea45c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
These radical-left Democrats in power are bound and determined to spend our country into bankruptcy, keep the border wide open so illegal immigrants can continue flooding in, and escalate the weaponization of our federal government against conservatives.

_I’m proud to be leading the fight for Alabama and America, and I know you are too!_

Enough is enough of this far-left insanity in Washington. It’s time to take action. [**THANK YOU for any donation you can send to fuel our efforts!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/556489434d7ba290/bf6a6ccd7eb402b8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

\- Coach

name: Terri Sewell
subject: so much is at stake

body:
Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. Peter, Why are Dinesh D’Souza, Dan Scavino, and so many more big name conservatives teaming up with Fair Courts America?
**Because there’s no more important battle in America right now than the one we’re fighting.****We must preserve our justice system from Soros’s deliberate sabotage.**

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We don’t like to share bad news, but we need to be honest with you today.
#

Hi team -
We don’t like to share bad news, but we need to be honest with you today.
**However, we’ll start with some good news for your Saturday:**
Since GIFFORDS’ founding ten years ago, our movement to end gun violence has grown stronger than ever. We’ve helped pass over 525 gun safety laws in states across the country, and last year, we secured the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , the first major federal gun safety legislation enacted in nearly 30 years. These laws at the local, state, and federal level are key steps towards keeping our communities and our children safe from gun violence.
**But here’s the bad news:**
We know it’s hard to believe, but after tonight, we’ll be halfway through the month of July. We have a goal to raise $10,000 before our mid-month deadline passes tonight, and as of now, we’re not where we need to be. The only way we can do our lifesaving work is when people like you step up and chip in what they can, whenever they can.
So we have to ask you today: [**Will you please make your first online contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support is critical as we rapidly approach our mid-month fundraising deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230715-1-subs&t=1&akid=6142%2E3935704%2EyDzrZd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july23.np0YAl&amount=3&t=20&akid=6142%2E3935704%2EyDzrZd)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july23.0BPTHR&refcode=em230715-1-subs&t=21&akid=6142%2E3935704%2EyDzrZd)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july23.pq2TcN&refcode=em230715-1-subs&t=22&akid=6142%2E3935704%2EyDzrZd)**

| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july23.m2TE3G&refcode=em230715-1-subs&t=23&akid=6142%2E3935704%2EyDzrZd)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: The Cruelty of Transgender Surgery for Children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_buJF9u0zVJyZ5yR3J9X2GVH4qiIvgwcn4kv_MMHTO3OGwEZvm4Kpl_He7c3p_jqaXf8pzqQ4RD5RMbVWrYEu06SbztGXvRKvVRupUtgtwHCczd3QljoNbaPZsZgTrp_qbnAkr_Dv8MhtKvWCQbb_b_8ku3eWllCXoxIwqk_9oW_5r-s35knF4FhreQWRLafAQ2RjzDzG-wJsuQfXTDYe9n7YgAJjbmdYFo46IrOeDgu2IKiOYT21oexahy-MXkQ_lfpo5SmYZ2H0f_CRsj0HuBOtZvwRZ10gz&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
|
Peter –
This week, I continued my efforts to prevent taxpayer dollars from funding programs at children's hospitals that perform transgender "care" on minors. The House also passed the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) that included a policy I introduced to advance a breakthrough, lifesaving treatment option for our service members living with PTSD.
If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. [Any amount helps, and you can help me grow our conservative movement by donating to my campaign here. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_bpzhKo8cdvJAihHZp972JH0nz7741Jz1RKKrRVw0Dq7Bzek07ckNpkJF1pv6MGxlAyPfSxu5c2qvHgouzuqt9jXNcw5rbyEaFiMWWGJpIJ4Q0XEY5HE9J2YR7LsR6fqLlq93mcuLaObuqoXKMGts3hQoV_Ra1aTivz8bAwjBFgI8m3HKuZ99vx9brJerXYTlnTNYutUf1C1K9TS6l97CKcPny7JirMn_TmkyiY2R9A7tyZXH7XMzVK3C5xRJX9VQ4pg_SE6CG_52rUjYwWnZx9R8O3XU-PUPTxPrh27koy_Q=&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your Campaign Brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| NO TAXPAYER FUNDING FOR TRANSGENDER "CARE" FOR MINORS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_broOk4p2vStVMfXsuWa-d4dZZPpTGxHBIwGkJZ93IvheL2__XVBvft24kqCNFCoL01ML5Jl-iB687Pd8y6LAvxi74mS-tIbcrGSYvy5gDFVaqHWSZ5TOkW7tR0UhCDz8mEfoPYMESv_g9UYC2rCdrhNu8BAgV0tjt6qhIFOrMhkHdkjcet5uySYkfH6QDyTJT&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_broOk4p2vStVMfXsuWa-d4dZZPpTGxHBIwGkJZ93IvheL2__XVBvft24kqCNFCoL01ML5Jl-iB687Pd8y6LAvxi74mS-tIbcrGSYvy5gDFVaqHWSZ5TOkW7tR0UhCDz8mEfoPYMESv_g9UYC2rCdrhNu8BAgV0tjt6qhIFOrMhkHdkjcet5uySYkfH6QDyTJT&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
| |
---
| Last month, I stunned a Yale doctor into silence when I asked her a simple question at a Congressional hearing: are there any scientific studies that provide strong evidence of the benefits of providing transgender "care" for children?
You can [watch the clip at this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_bf9yEbfZlJebYvGS1AqtaNA-kekkvmdSuYTG7zMUNCxJwLYviS3yZSMttZs_Z71KZffKxKmWGtNkAW9MElw5yVosYrAmBaDzgprfZg-1nM0wkNBZVf_HZoenysOwtRYvOSSEVUv1QVJI=&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==), if you missed it last month.
What that exchange proved was something every single common sense American already knows: of course there are no studies showing the benefits of making permanent, dangerous changes to a child's sex.
This week, that debate continued at my committee, where my Democrat colleagues once again argued that I was "cruel" for wanting to stop taxpayer dollars from going to program funding for children's hospitals that perform child sex changes. But I am not the one who is cruel. Doing a double mastectomy on a 12-year-old girl is cruel. Castrating a ten-year-old boy--that's cruel. And it's certainly cruel to put kids on permanent hormone therapy and puberty blockers that could prevent them from ever having children and permanently change their physiology.
The idea that we should encourage and even help children to permanently change their gender is a new, dangerous phenomenon. We've seen this phenomenon sweep through our schools, in the mainstream media, and now at our children's hospitals. Yet there's no evidence of the safety or benefits of transgender "care" for minors, and no long-term studies to truly evaluate the impact this "treatment" could have decades later.
Moreover, our peer countries are practically screaming at us to put this madness to an end. Over the last few years, countries like Britain, Finland, Sweden, and France have all sounded the alarm on the dangers of "gender affirming care" for minors and have taken steps to rein in this practice.
That's why I introduced legislation that would prevent federal funding - your taxpayer dollars - under the Graduate Medical Education program from going to children's hospitals that provide "gender affirming care" to minors. This week, my committee advanced this legislation out of the Health Subcommittee, bringing it one step closer to a vote in the full House of Representatives.
That's good news, along with the fact that the American people agree with us: according to the latest polls, nearly 70% of Americans disapprove of providing puberty blockers to minors.
The bad news is that Congressional Democrats are going to do everything in their power to stop this legislation and use their allies in the media to spread lies about this bill and smear our efforts. That's why I need your help.
Sign the below petition to make it clear that you do not want your taxpayer dollars going to programs for children's hospitals that perform this pseudoscience on our kids. The more people sign the petition, the better chance we have in making the argument that the American people do not support this dangerous ideology that has infected our country's medical institutions.
[SIGN THE PETITION. STOP TAXPAYER DOLLARS FROM GOING TOWARD TRANSGENDER "CARE" FOR MINORS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_bwHLqhNOoQvbC1SE0DicLsGhoDbhhmPWaHUdEaXzAmQVK2UtHawGj5oKuwdnx_4h1MgNJ8aMV79qRQsA5h1gYHzR2xQvqOyo2Wfc-neu5rTMQiOLZNoWv51odYUFCLcYCyNC4a3rxRbdQA93kfJIWFLAjHDRl_rxnPIhPdNn29zpiROjdSwvgcxkXRzUbaIyHfMHK4qOTNeHTWsu3k2m_cr0-0Ti55idtM1ljDFMsQSkPZrCMHjMCKlnuaHigRmji-enLu5Kps9seQDIxUK5tRJaVp8KqwKwt86aHPFiiyi1yZDjjjBflqQ==&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| HERE'S WHY I'M TEAMING UP WITH AOC TO FIGHT PTSD
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_bwONFE9VqeL-28Zrup98Lba0RMWKFfBCrhBbWWL5R1DivAYrEFX_FWrZYwn5Z9m_111nXGosqvYVMZ-q0IIwP9nTCmnhAhiRNOAjyAI8IU4ceT9Nfa4lBHfKvtGjEvOgBFYlVihAbo0mmvSS_guCWz91jUoAs0a-zFscar9DfV-C981wqMgV06qY7wiFCiyGh2k2uZSFGQLiYLeQgR5VQVg==&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GChCUVM69zawIWctQSnZm4Sf7A12pYiS4e97lEH9PqmeREsIe68ZWl3RFaXpZv_bwONFE9VqeL-28Zrup98Lba0RMWKFfBCrhBbWWL5R1DivAYrEFX_FWrZYwn5Z9m_111nXGosqvYVMZ-q0IIwP9nTCmnhAhiRNOAjyAI8IU4ceT9Nfa4lBHfKvtGjEvOgBFYlVihAbo0mmvSS_guCWz91jUoAs0a-zFscar9DfV-C981wqMgV06qY7wiFCiyGh2k2uZSFGQLiYLeQgR5VQVg==&c=DM_4zNBc_73gSAwMZFGVvhsh_R3X8JVp4Pgaa3aNSoRj1LkZhPSpqA==&ch=7gSG6s6s0X9JMYkqnLiHcZ6TpHw7kfTAJaZE9aJA2Q6SdUSV1V0UWg==)
---
| |
---
| There is not much that Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and I agree on when it comes to public policy. But as you know after following me since I've been in Congress, I will never allow party affiliation or politics to prevent me from working with someone if it's for the benefit of the American people, especially when it comes to our veterans and service members. That's why I had zero hesitation in teaming up with AOC and many others on legislation to help service members struggling with PTSD.
We all know the statistics-- it is estimated that more than 20 veterans commit suicide every day. And 27% of post-9/11 veterans are diagnosed with PTSD. It is a serious problem, and we have not made enough progress in treating PTSD. The status quo is not working and the status quo won't stop veterans and service members from committing suicide. We have to think outside the box.
The good news is that there is a breakthrough therapy that uses psychedelics to treat PTSD. Recent private sector research into the use of psychedelics such as MDMA found that 88% of trial participants had a significant reduction in symptoms and 67% no longer met the criteria for PTSD. And, beyond the data, I've heard personal stories from my friends and fellow veterans who've told me how this therapy saved their lives and marriages and pulled them out of the depths of despair.
That's why I've been working with a broad, bipartisan coalition of lawmakers on legislation that directs the Department of Defense to provide grants for further research into the use of psychedelic treatments for our active-duty service members dealing with PTSD and Traumatic Brain Injury. We made significant progress this week when the House passed the annual NDAA, which included this policy. Unfortunately, the $15 million that was authorized under our original bill was stripped out of the final package that passed out of the House. But I'm going to do everything I can to get that funding back in the bill to ensure we have the necessary resources to gain the research we need to advance this breakthrough, lifesaving treatment.
You can help, too. Now that this bill is over in the Senate, CALL YOUR SENATOR and tell them to include my bill in the final NDAA. If this policy is passed into law, we will make significant progress in treating PTSD and saving the lives of our service members who have sacrificed so much for the country we love.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, I continued my efforts to prevent taxpayer dollars from funding programs at children's hospitals that perform transgender "care" on minors. The House also passed the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) that included a policy I introduced to advance a breakthrough, lifesaving treatment option for our service members living with PTSD. If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. == As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your Campaign Brief: | | | | | | | | NO TAXPAYER FUNDING FOR TRANSGENDER "CARE" FOR MINORS | | | == | == | | | Last month, I stunned a Yale doctor into silence when I asked her a simple question at a Congressional hearing: are there any scientific studies that provide strong evidence of the benefits of providing transgender "care" for children? You can ==, if you missed it last month. What that exchange proved was something every single common sense American already knows: of course there are no studies showing the benefits of making permanent, dangerous changes to a child's sex. This week, that debate continued at my committee, where my Democrat colleagues once again argued that I was "cruel" for wanting to stop taxpayer dollars from going to program funding for children's hospitals that perform child sex changes. But I am not the one who is cruel. Doing a double mastectomy on a 12-year-old girl is cruel. Castrating a ten-year-old boy--that's cruel. And it's certainly cruel to put kids on permanent hormone therapy and puberty blockers that could prevent them from ever having children and permanently change their physiology. The idea that we should encourage and even help children to permanently change their gender is a new, dangerous phenomenon. We've seen this phenomenon sweep through our schools, in the mainstream media, and now at our children's hospitals. Yet there's no evidence of the safety or benefits of transgender "care" for minors, and no long-term studies to truly evaluate the impact this "treatment" could have decades later. Moreover, our peer countries are practically screaming at us to put this madness to an end. Over the last few years, countries like Britain, Finland, Sweden, and France have all sounded the alarm on the dangers of "gender affirming care" for minors and have taken steps to rein in this practice. That's why I introduced legislation that would prevent federal funding - your taxpayer dollars - under the Graduate Medical Education program from going to children's hospitals that provide "gender affirming care" to minors. This week, my committee advanced this legislation out of the Health Subcommittee, bringing it one step closer to a vote in the full House of Representatives. That's good news, along with the fact that the American people agree with us: according to the latest polls, nearly 70% of Americans disapprove of providing puberty blockers to minors. The bad news is that Congressional Democrats are going to do everything in their power to stop this legislation and use their allies in the media to spread lies about this bill and smear our efforts. That's why I need your help. Sign the below petition to make it clear that you do not want your taxpayer dollars going to programs for children's hospitals that perform this pseudoscience on our kids. The more people sign the petition, the better chance we have in making the argument that the American people do not support this dangerous ideology that has infected our country's medical institutions. == | | | | | | | | HERE'S WHY I'M TEAMING UP WITH AOC TO FIGHT PTSD | == | == | | | There is not much that Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and I agree on when it comes to public policy. But as you know after following me since I've been in Congress, I will never allow party affiliation or politics to prevent me from working with someone if it's for the benefit of the American people, especially when it comes to our veterans and service members. That's why I had zero hesitation in teaming up with AOC and many others on legislation to help service members struggling with PTSD. We all know the statistics-- it is estimated that more than 20 veterans commit suicide every day. And 27% of post-9/11 veterans are diagnosed with PTSD. It is a serious problem, and we have not made enough progress in treating PTSD. The status quo is not working and the status quo won't stop veterans and service members from committing suicide. We have to think outside the box. The good news is that there is a breakthrough therapy that uses psychedelics to treat PTSD. Recent private sector research into the use of psychedelics such as MDMA found that 88% of trial participants had a significant reduction in symptoms and 67% no longer met the criteria for PTSD. And, beyond the data, I've heard personal stories from my friends and fellow veterans who've told me how this therapy saved their lives and marriages and pulled them out of the depths of despair. That's why I've been working with a broad, bipartisan coalition of lawmakers on legislation that directs the Department of Defense to provide grants for further research into the use of psychedelic treatments for our active-duty service members dealing with PTSD and Traumatic Brain Injury. We made significant progress this week when the House passed the annual NDAA, which included this policy. Unfortunately, the $15 million that was authorized under our original bill was stripped out of the final package that passed out of the House. But I'm going to do everything I can to get that funding back in the bill to ensure we have the necessary resources to gain the research we need to advance this breakthrough, lifesaving treatment. You can help, too. Now that this bill is over in the Senate, CALL YOUR SENATOR and tell them to include my bill in the final NDAA. If this policy is passed into law, we will make significant progress in treating PTSD and saving the lives of our service members who have sacrificed so much for the country we love. | | | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | FOX NEWS: == DAILY WIRE: == WSJ: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Friend,

The support we've received so far this year has been insane. I am so grateful. With every negative email, there are 5 positive ones! It makes everything worth it.

At times, this job gets tough. As I'm sure you know, working hard and raising a family is not the easiest job in the world, but it's definitely rewarding. I'm so thankful to know you're on my team.

I wanted to share an email I received from one of my supporters this past week asking an important question.

Just a reminder, if you would like to support my efforts to flip the Senate RED in 2024, **[feel free to contribute anything you can towards my July Mid-Month fundraising deadline. Any donation made using this link will make an immediate DOUBLE IMPACT before this deadline hits.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=8af30146c723497fabae0c7436f7449d&_e=1VOAtnA991Ovr2KEeWRX_zaCmnmzvFSR6gB7P8QTAgltnrezP2CdMeFLjwFF8ZJOZwsqwuke_KXFbPFjiPkKZKBXtv7A2xOEe4qCzN14OO_DoCl_ArVazVfjLa3VZ9tppMZ3wz5mj3rwEMI-mFy_QJmBlb_-PusNgN5vUCFpanYhh6Zrm9-mnIg3OshqQG30_YZ6eTY512onR2U7hxApEt17WgNgiUm7-wr9FrgIAyY9gEcUss0zN_aNhDk6yDVGtn6hsK4GYWn1hzEfG5tIS030pDKs5LqgUSTFF-y21kzCh3oVWFpsEbexGMktT5CRVu5uEH-X-W9MRcENLzTbk3m3lVRc-Gmu7MMpNttiun1rvgQcSIEj5h5Lt-kaeRrgvUIoT1Jfj1-3vl4eh2iGwA_axpzS1LpirRhIO6OpVQ3M32m7tQUUv1o05m00wOUh5i_9TX6dXOAqT_gIGu5qPvZQZ8OWc_8ptX2f_fK6PlHheyW7ecBP2KrVcDblv3XnEJae2x2BM7YdXBkj-QvevvcBURQmnW9Q3u6esdewkxY%3D)**

Thank you again, JD

_Sent from my iPhone.
_

_**\----Forwarded Message----**

Subject: I can't believe this
To: Vance for Senate
From: Mac S. (Redacted for privacy)
Date: Friday, July 14, 2023, at 12:06 PM

Hi JD,

My name is Mac S., (Redacted for privacy), and I wanted to bring up something I saw on Twitter the other day.

I didn't realize all the costs associated with running for public office... I read that in some states, it costs thousands of dollars just to get on the ballot?!

It made me wonder how I can help out before the 2024 elections. Where can I donate? How else can I help? We NEED more conservatives in office.

You really are so honest and transparent with us, which is so rare these days in politics. Here's to more conservatives winning in 2024!

All my best,

Mac S. (Redacted for privacy)

\----Begin Forwarded Message----

Hi Mac,

First, I just wanted to thank you for your support and for reaching out to me! Reading your words really made my day.

Every campaign starts with grassroots support! I wish the base knew how important it is to knock on doors and make calls.

Any donation -- no matter how small -- is so helpful to conservative campaigns right now. Small donations really do add up and go a long way! Use this**[ LINK](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=8af30146c723497fabae0c7436f7449d&_e=1VOAtnA991Ovr2KEeWRX_zaCmnmzvFSR6gB7P8QTAgltnrezP2CdMeFLjwFF8ZJOZwsqwuke_KXFbPFjiPkKZKBXtv7A2xOEe4qCzN14OO_DoCl_ArVazVfjLa3VZ9tppMZ3wz5mj3rwEMI-mFy_QJmBlb_-PusNgN5vUCFpanYhh6Zrm9-mnIg3OshqQG30_YZ6eTY512onR2U7hxApEt17WgNgiUm7-wr9FrgIAyY9gEcUss0zN_aNhDk6yDVGtn6hsK4GYWn1hzEfG5tIS030pDKs5LqgUSTFF-y21kzCh3oVWFpsEbexGMktT5CRVu5uEH-X-W9MRcENLzTbk3m3lVRc-Gmu7MMpNttiun1rvgQcSIEj5h5Lt-kaeRrgvUIoT1Jfj1-3vl4eh2iGwO2vZ0tdWQU1eThnwG4Jw7BOXZO6N6dwCVDf3Wmx3aLRCbRWonHm1Wmy9fI0OCKmttBRsrfC-LjD_SRAgT9yCtI5SXlErTJ0Mu0HRJVNpOd2M-8aPPSMWlNjMtk1tR7QSYnYx3vNQNOCfLhnx9ypbNQ%3D)** if you want to donate (and send it to your friends!)

Thank you again for your support, and let me know if I can answer any other questions.
_ _Best, JD

| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

This week in Washington, I took action to stop Joe Biden from pushing his woke agenda on our military, hold the Pentagon accountable for their sloppy bookkeeping, and fight the left's two-tiered system of justice in our country.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake

| The Oversight Committee has uncovered more information about the Biden family business schemes in the last **5 MONTHS** than the DOJ has in the last **5 YEARS** —and we are only just getting started.

**Here's what we know: **
✓ **9 members of the Biden family received over****$10 million****in payments from companies linked to foreign nationals.**
✓ **The Bidens set up 20 shell companies to hide these payments.**
✓ **Some of these transactions occurred while Joe Biden was still Vice President!**

The Oversight Committee will hear from two IRS whistleblowers next week that will confirm our investigation into the Biden family's influence-peddling schemes and explain how the DOJ covered up for "the Big Guy."

I joined Mornings with Maria to discuss the two-tiered system of justice in America under Joe Biden. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=342c02c773&e=1050d051da)

| For the past two and a half years, Joe Biden and the far-left bureaucrats in his administration have forced their woke ideology onto our servicemembers.

_**It's disgusting and un-American.**_

Our military should be focused on defending America from our enemies—not pushing Bernie and AOC's woke agenda. This week House Republicans took action to **DEFUND** these radical programs in America's military.

I proudly voted for this year's NDAA bill that bans critical race theory, ends DEI overreach, and eliminates funding for drag shows. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=81a84bc790&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOLDING THE PENTAGON ACCOUNTABLE**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6173147eb4&e=1050d051da)
---
| The Pentagon is no stranger to sloppy accounting practices. The DoD has failed five consecutive audits and the agency doesn't even know how many contractors they employ.

Just last month, the DoD overestimated the value of weapons sent to Ukraine by **$6.2 BILLION. **This is completely unacceptable.
**No business or organization in America operates this way.**
I grilled DoD officials this week on their incompetent accounting practices. I will not sit back and just accept these errors from the Pentagon. Americans deserve better and I will never stop fighting to better protect our hard-earned tax dollars. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=054af54537&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **THE BIDENS OPERATE ON A DIFFERENT SET OF RULES**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bd2e02cf53&e=1050d051da)
---
| CLICK [HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1736460a7f&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW
---
| The Secret Service just announced yesterday that they will **NOT** be able to identify the individual who brought a bag of cocaine into the White House earlier this month.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e7374f7048&e=1050d051da)
---
| _**The White House is the most secure building in the world, and we can't even find out who brought illegal drugs into the West Wing. How is that possible?**_

The mainstream media is once again covering for the Biden administration and doing everything they can to sweep this under the rug.

The Oversight Committee will not stop until we uncover the truth. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0574ff5875&e=1050d051da)
---
|

| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

body:
We're just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. Hey Peter,

We're just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. I wanted to take a moment to share some of the latest news in our race and why it's important we end this deadline strong and keep our fundraising on pace.

With less than four months until Election Day, this race remains tight. A Republican poll shows I'm tied with my opponent and election experts are predicting this will be the most competitive race in the entire country this year.

My opponent and his allies take this news as a sign they can defeat me and undo the progress we've made for Kentucky. That's why they're spending millions to attack me. Finishing our mid-month deadline on a strong note ensures we have the resources to fight back and pull ahead.

**But, Peter, we can't do that without your support. Will you please chip in before our mid-month deadline at midnight so we can win this tough race and continue making progress for Kentucky? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-july-23?refcode2=personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524026/416668759/950424521?refcode=em23_230715_ddln6_fndd_gq_act___andy_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230715_ddln6_fndd_gq_act___andy_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6e6283f8-1723-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTYyODNmOC0xNzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ov_XdEKPsllDyzAsaalwo0QcIGQxHpCSTWt5iLddDQ=)**

Thank you,

Andy

_I'm deeply grateful, Peter._ I'm grateful that at a time when political ideology seems to divide so many of us, you continue to join me in the work to make this state and our country work better. We share common goals: to expand health care access, secure fundamental rights, and protect our climate for future generations. And on the hard days — when we can't come to bipartisan agreements with the other side on our priorities, or when political extremists introduce radical legislation to take us backward — it makes a big difference to know I have you with me in the fight. _I can also always count on you when we reach out for financial support as we work to end the GOP’s one-vote supermajorities in Raleigh and keep NC on the path of progress._ **[I have a request that I hope you’ll consider before midnight: Please, make a donation of $10, $50, or anything you can to help our team get halfway to our July fundraising goal — just click here or the buttons below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524140/416669054/435245919?refcode=ea.7a6c7af2-1723-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7a6c7af2-1723-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZjN2FmMi0xNzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNMY4uEcOrZif10_hW-uXzyBInmqxpXh93gLEJRWD-I=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524141/416669056/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.7a6c7af2-1723-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7a6c7af2-1723-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZjN2FmMi0xNzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNMY4uEcOrZif10_hW-uXzyBInmqxpXh93gLEJRWD-I=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524590/416670212/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230715HealthcareOpEd_N_TEAM_30DO_5_G_TESTB_P1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWU4NjYyMC0xODIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOramG7CoWsGL-6jmDzLVRSST_6-cSfVZFy3pWlnIOE=) As the Ohio legislature strips away our unalienable rights, volunteers are heroically flying Ohioans across state borders to receive necessary reproductive and gender-affirming care. This flight for freedom evokes memories of dystopian and oppressive regimes, but this is a reality for millions of Americans.

**_People should not have to flee their states for healthcare,_** but recent Supreme Court decisions have left many people, especially women, people of color, and transgender people, feeling like they need to.

As a Black woman, Shontel knows and dreads the trajectory of our country if federal civil rights are not enshrined and enforced. The only way to protect the rights of every Ohioan–of every American–is with new federal protections. But to do it, we must take back the House in 2024.

[**_So, Peter, can we count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help Shontel Brown and Democrats in Congress pass the Women's Health Protection Act? Your support now will help elect the leaders we need to protect our rights._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524591/416670213/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230715HealthcareOpEd_N_TEAM_30DO_5_G_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWU4NjYyMC0xODIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOramG7CoWsGL-6jmDzLVRSST_6-cSfVZFy3pWlnIOE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524592/416670214/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230715HealthcareOpEd_N_TEAM_30DO_5_G_TESTB_EL1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWU4NjYyMC0xODIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOramG7CoWsGL-6jmDzLVRSST_6-cSfVZFy3pWlnIOE=)**

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: we'll be quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=354%2E791427%2EG_FAkH)
Hey team — we know it's the weekend, so we'll be quick.
Today's the 15th, which means we're just about halfway through the month of July.
Ideally, we'd be about halfway to our team fundraising goal for the month, too — but the truth is that we're pacing behind. As of this morning, we're sitting at about 36%.
Is it the end of the world? No. We still have time to get back on track. But to do that it is important that we have a big day today — especially on email and texting, where the vast majority of our grassroots donations come from.
If you could chip in a $3 contribution for Ilhan today using the link below, it'd mean a lot. We're tracking everything here:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/July-Midmonth](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230715-1-t1&t=2&akid=354%2E791427%2EG_FAkH)**
It's the resources we raise here in 2023 that'll pay off the most in 2024, so thank you for your support.
\- Team Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230715-1-t1&t=3&akid=354%2E791427%2EG_FAkH)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=354%2E791427%2EG_FAkH)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=354_791427_G_FAkH&akid=354%2E791427%2EG_FAkH)**.

name: Patty
subject: Just heard the news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I know this grassroots movement has the power to close this gap before my deadline at midnight
Hi, Peter. It's Sen. Murray here. Sorry to reach out again, but my team just told me I'm **$5,128 short of my mid-month goal.**
---
I know this grassroots movement has the power to close this gap before my deadline at midnight, but only if folks like you chip in now.
Democrats are facing tough Senate races in Nevada, Ohio and Montana**** – and each and every one of these are critical to defending our Senate Democratic majority. It's so important that I hit this goal tonight so we stay on track to keep the Senate blue.
**[So please, if you believe in our Democratic agenda, will you chip in $5 now to help me close this fundraising gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66524878/416671199/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzRjOGNhNC0xODIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAvByGD4wMK7bDFGXEOKjvEjc-oQ_5gfeO37V9puS10=)**

Each and every day, I work in the Senate to build a better future for families in Washington state and across the country. **Here are just a few of the policies that I'm working to pass:**
– No out-of-pocket costs for over-the-counter birth control
– Making child care affordable and easy to find
– Finally making national paid leave a reality
We're making progress on all of these key issues and more, but Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies want to put a halt to our Democratic agenda. And they're willing to spend millions to flip the Senate red.

body:
#
Friends -
My team reached out to you yesterday about our July mid-month deadline. Now, I am giving you an honest look at the update they gave me last night. This is what our fundraising has looked like since the end of last quarter.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230715-1-tt&t=1&akid=4650%2E196590%2EAKNnjs)
Those are not the results I wanted to share with you today. But it’s my responsibility to be transparent with you. Our fundraising has plummeted since the end of the quarter.
If we don’t reach our goals this month, we are going to have a difficult time maintaining our momentum.
No, the sky won’t fall if we don't hit our goals this July and our movement won’t collapse. But we will have to slow down on the progress we have made thus far. And with an election cycle as crucial as this one, we don’t want to leave any stone unturned.
[**So if you can afford it, please make a $3 contribution to our movement ahead of our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230715-1-tt&t=2&akid=4650%2E196590%2EAKNnjs)

Mandela

subject: Republican race to the bottom

body:
|
---
Peter, The Republican primary for governor is getting crazier by the week. A few days ago, former Attorney General Curtis Hill joined the clown car race. As AG, Hill disgraced Indiana when he sexually harassed a state legislator and three staffers at a social event. Hoosiers remember the embarrassment that Curtis Hill brought to our state. [**For the good of our state, we must stop Curtis Hill and end 20 years of Republican control. Chip in now to help us bring balance back to Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66527352/416677435/405560545?refcode=230715-Republicans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2VkNGI3NC0xYjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yK3cVmCvEZJ7hZPr5pzmHllynr54a31AnhfCkMQRcQc=) **** Hill joins Mike Braun and Suzanne Crouch, as they try to prove who can be more extreme. clean_body: | Peter, The Republican primary for governor is getting crazier by the week. A few days ago, former Attorney General Curtis Hill joined the clown car race. As AG, Hill disgraced Indiana when he sexually harassed a state legislator and three staffers at a social event. Hoosiers remember the embarrassment that Curtis Hill brought to our state. = ** Hill joins Mike Braun and Suzanne Crouch, as they try to prove who can be more extreme. Earlier this year, Crouch said she hears Hoosiers are worried about losing their freedoms. That’s because of her policies. As LG, she promoted the Republican abortion ban, and has consistently opposed policies to make people live a life of their choosing. Braun has proven he’s a sell out to special interests in the Senate. He voted to allow our country to default multiple times, and promoted claims that the 2020 election was rigged. We can stop him. **= Thanks, Indiana Democrats | | | = | = [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Hi Team,
As Gabe’s campaign manager, it’s my job to make sure that we have the funds we need to re-elect Gabe next November.
Each and every quarter, our campaign submits financial reports to the Federal Elections Committee (FEC). These reports become publicly available for anyone with an internet connection to view.
Here’s what matters on these reports:
• Our cash available
• How much we’re spending compared to how much we’re raising
• The number of donors who’ve contributed to our campaign
• And, yes, how much we’ve raised in total
Once the reports are released later tonight, we know we’ll be proud of our numbers. **But it’ll be our first glimpse at former Rep. Herrell’s fundraising efforts back on the campaign trail.**
It’s my job as the campaign manager to make sure we don’t lose any steam or focus. Gabe flipped NM-02 by just 1,350 votes, and this race is sure to be close again next November.
[Can you chip in $5, $10, or $20 right now? Your contributions now will go a long way to funding the work we need to do to secure Gabe’s victory in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66528087/416678626/-348140913?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230715FilingTake_cm_od30_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzJjZDYyMi0xYzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5GdVKBKWp2hVQ2bVs52o2FUgO54ngnrebNF4PVqC-E=)

clean_body: It’s my job as the campaign manager to make sure we don’t lose any steam or focus | | = Hi Team, As Gabe’s campaign manager, it’s my job to make sure that we have the funds we need to re-elect Gabe next November. Each and every quarter, our campaign submits financial reports to the Federal Elections Committee (FEC). These reports become publicly available for anyone with an internet connection to view. Here’s what matters on these reports: • Our cash available • How much we’re spending compared to how much we’re raising • The number of donors who’ve contributed to our campaign • And, yes, how much we’ve raised in total Once the reports are released later tonight, we know we’ll be proud of our numbers. But it’ll be our first glimpse at former Rep. Herrell’s fundraising efforts back on the campaign trail. It’s my job as the campaign manager to make sure we don’t lose any steam or focus. name: Jon Tester
subject: I just checked our numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email]Morning, Peter.
Sorry for the early email... between my first major GOP opponent launching their campaign last month to thinking about this week’s mid-month deadline, I wasn’t able to get much sleep last night. So I figured while I was sitting here drinking my coffee, I would update you on where things stand.
Before I explain more, can you pitch in a split donation between Wiley Nickel’s campaign and mine to help us respond to my GOP opponent and meet our critical mid-month goal by tomorrow at midnight? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email]Montana is the GOP’s top target to flip in 2024. It’s why Mitch McConnell just handpicked an opponent for me who can self-fund his own campaign and be his yes-man in Congress. Millions of dollars are going to flood into the state from his mega-donors and national Republicans who are trying their best to buy Montana’s Senate seat.
So we have to respond fast, and respond right now—especially at this turning point in the campaign. That means we need to hit all of our fundraising targets to have the resources to fight back.
But folks , I just checked our fundraising numbers, and right now, we need a serious boost in grassroots donations if we’re going to hit our mid-month fundraising goal.
There’s no question about it. With less than 48 hours until the deadline, we’re cutting it close. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help this morning:
Can you give a split donation between mine and Wiley’s campaigns to help us close the gap and reach our big fundraising goal so we can grow this campaign and respond to incoming GOP attacks? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q2-wn-mm-tester?refcode=230715-email]Thank you, your support means so much.
Jon

United States

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: This is the honest truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I can’t do any of this on my own.
#
Peter,
When I flew back this week from an official trip overseas, I made the same trek my grandmother and mother did years ago when they came from Lithuania to the United States, pursuing a better life.
I couldn’t help thinking about the promise of America that led my family to this country, as well as the responsibility we have to make good on that promise, rather than risk letting it slip away.
In Washington, I’m working for comprehensive immigration reform so that people like my mother can pursue the American dream. I’m pushing for urgent action to stop gun violence in our communities and to lower health care costs for our families. And as Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I’m making it a top priority to do what the Chief Justice has failed to do and finally create an enforceable code of conduct for the Supreme Court.
I take my role as Senator very seriously — but the honest truth is that I can’t do any of this on my own. I need folks just like you, who believe in the promise of this country, right alongside me.
**[Please donate anything you can to help meet our July goal and keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66533796/416687422/826308275?refcode=dd_em_230715_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFiZDI1OC0yMDIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=958CYYFz1ida_KJUxoXVxEQbRJhfPhvPO9bBQKIw0d0=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Kicking off quarter three
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Preparation is key and Team Pramila needs a little help from you.
#
Peter,
Did you see yesterday's message?
We're kicking off quarter three with a mid-month fundraising push to reach $7,500 from emails just like this one and we need your help to close the gap. **So far we've raised $3,788, but that means we still have a long way to go before our deadline at midnight tonight.**[**Can we count on you to rush a donation of $3 or whatever you're able to right now to help us reach our goal and continue building our movement's momentum?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42728?refcode=em20230715-2704&t=1&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42728?refcode=em20230715-2704&t=2&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)**
Be sure to keep reading below to hear why it's so important that we show up for Pramila and our campaign in the slower summer months.
Together,
Jayapal HQ
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal [info@pramilaforcongress.com]
Date: Fri, July 14, 2023
Subject: I won't compromise on our values
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter,
July is often a slow fundraising month for campaigns like ours. Families are on vacations, kids are out of school, and most people are far away from their emails and computers.
That means that we need to work extra hard to build up our grassroots support to continue powering our campaign and maintain our momentum. **To keep pace with our July plans, we've set a goal to raise $7,500 by midnight tomorrow to boost our resources.**
[**Can we count on you to support our grassroots movement by making a contribution of $3 or whatever you're able to contribute today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42728?refcode=em20230715-2704&t=3&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42728?refcode=em20230715-2704&t=22&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)**
We need to be building support for our progressive values at every level possible, and that starts by building our power from the ground up. As a grassroots movement, we don't rely on massive corporate PACs or million dollar mega-donors to bankroll our campaigns because that kind of support comes at a cost.
I'm not willing to compromise on the key policies that our country deserves. We deserve a just economy, comprehensive and universal health care, honorable education systems, housing as a human right, and so much more.
Not only is Washington state gearing up for the August primary elections, but I'm keeping up the pressure in Washington D.C. to continue fighting for our values at the federal level to ensure that our progressive voices are heard.
**Let's show up for our entire grassroots movement****, Peter.**[**Chip in today to help us kick off our mid-month fundraising efforts to reach our $7,500 goal by midnight on Saturday.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42728?refcode=em20230715-2704&t=23&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)
Together,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230715-2704-footer&t=24&refcode2=2704_420207_D8mxam&akid=2704%2E420207%2ED8mxam)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Preparation is key and Team Pramila needs a little help from you. Peter, Did you see yesterday's message? We're kicking off quarter three with a mid-month fundraising push to reach $7,500 from emails just like this one and we need your help to close the gap. So far we've raised $3,788, but that means we still have a long way to go before our deadline at midnight tonight. Be sure to keep reading below to hear why it's so important that we show up for Pramila and our campaign in the slower summer months. Together, Jayapal HQ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Pramila Jayapal [info@pramilaforcongress.com] Date: Fri, July 14, 2023 Subject: I won't compromise on our values To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Peter, July is often a slow fundraising month for campaigns like ours. Families are on vacations, kids are out of school, and most people are far away from their emails and computers. That means that we need to work extra hard to build up our grassroots support to continue powering our campaign and maintain our momentum. To keep pace with our July plans, we've set a goal to raise $7,500 by midnight tomorrow to boost our resources. We need to be building support for our progressive values at every level possible, and that starts by building our power from the ground up. As a grassroots movement, we don't rely on massive corporate PACs or million dollar mega-donors to bankroll our campaigns because that kind of support comes at a cost. I'm not willing to compromise on the key policies that our country deserves. We deserve a just economy, comprehensive and universal health care, honorable education systems, housing as a human right, and so much more. Not only is Washington state gearing up for the August primary elections, but I'm keeping up the pressure in Washington D.C. to continue fighting for our values at the federal level to ensure that our progressive voices are heard. Let's show up for our entire grassroots movement, Peter. Together, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: We believe in transparency.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our fundraising numbers aren’t where they should be.
#
Part of being a small-dollar, grassroots campaign means that we need to pay extremely close attention to our fundraising numbers to ensure that we have the resources to re-elect Alexandria. In 2020 alone, our Democratic and Republican opponents spent more than $13 million against us!
Because we believe in transparency, we want to let you know that our fundraising numbers aren’t where they should be in order to reach our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight.
**So far this month we’ve raised $127,428. At this point in June, we were at $149,548.** We can make up this gap and reach our $150,000 goal but we’re counting on our grassroots supporters to get us there.
[ Please make your first $5 donation today to help us close this gap before midnight. If enough folks contribute in response to this email, we’ll be able to reach this critical goal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230715.bYmvGT&refcode=em20230715-4637-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4637%2E2526796%2EhcSHo8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230715.bYmvGT&refcode=em20230715-4637-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4637%2E2526796%2EhcSHo8)**
Alexandria doesn’t host fancy cocktail fundraisers with big donors — she’s focused on legislating for change and organizing to build long-term power for communities that didn’t have a seat at the table until she came to Congress.
Whether you can afford to donate today or not: thank you so much for being a part of this movement for racial, economic, environmental, and social justice for all.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230715?refcode=em20230715-4637-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=21&refcode2=4637_2526796_hcSHo8&akid=4637%2E2526796%2EhcSHo8)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230715-4637-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=22&akid=4637%2E2526796%2EhcSHo8)**
---|---

---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Closing in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, _The Left wants you to ignore this email, but I’m counting on you to keep reading._

**Chuck Schumer and the Democrats have made it clear: they’ll do WHATEVER it takes to stop me.**

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Kevin McCarthy turned the NDAA into a culture war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
So, for the first time in VoteVets history, we opposed it.
#
Derek -
We had to make a tough decision this week.
The NDAA is the piece of legislation that authorizes funding for our Military. It pays our troops. We support its passage every year, and we work to get our friends and allies onboard, too.
But Kevin McCarthy and his caucus of conspiracy theorists and extremists turned the NDAA into another culture war, forcing their radical social agenda into an essential piece of our National Security apparatus.
Put simply, the NDAA has been MAGA-fied. So, for the first time in VoteVets history, we opposed it.
Derek, we don’t ever want to be here again.
That’s why we’re reaching out. We set up the **VoteVets Patriot Fund** a few months ago to elect Veterans, take back the House, and hold the Senate in 2024.
Help us get it done.
**[We’re asking you to chip in just $5 today. $5 to win in 2024. $5 to the Patriot Fund so we can shut down these radicals and extremists in the GOP and bring some sanity back to Congress.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july23.UD-seS&refcode=em230715-1-15&t=1&akid=11329%2E3013755%2EMC7vJ_)**
| [Add your $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july23.UD-seS&refcode=em230715-1-15&t=2&akid=11329%2E3013755%2EMC7vJ_)
---
And you have our word: We’ll put that $5 to good use in the months ahead.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: Lauren Boebert (parody)
subject: Don’t help Debby Burnett meet her midmonth goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_LB [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_LB]Peter, I’ve had a bad couple of months.
First, there was that new round of allegations that I misspent campaign funds and flouted federal regulations designed to protect our democracy.
Next, I didn’t even cast a vote on legislation to avoid an economic catastrophe. I was able to tweet 23 times against it, but I’m hoping you won’t notice that I can’t keep my story straight about whether I missed the vote or skipped it “in protest.”
Then, my progressive opponent Debby Burnett’s campaign launch video calling me out went viral on social media. That was really the pits because history shows that a fresh Democratic nominee like her has the best chance of kicking me out of office.
Don’t worry though. I’m not changing one bit! Just yesterday, I was able to get my hateful poison-pill amendment to appease my extremist special-interest cronies included in the defense bill. Political analysts are saying this puts this critical, must-pass legislation in jeopardy, but what do I care about actually funding the Department of Defense?
Rest assured, I’ll continue to ignore the needs of my constituents, focus on my own fortune and fame, and prepare for my next Fox News appearance instead of doing my job.
That’s why I really hope that you won’t chip in to Debby Burnett’s midmonth fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=link_CTA] (I’m relying on my extremist pals and dark money to keep me in office, but Debby is counting on grassroots supporters like you.)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
Give $25 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25-link]
Give $50 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50-link]
Give $250 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode2=abx250-link]
Give another amount to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=abx-other-link]
Debby Burnett is running for Congress to make a difference for families here in Western and Southern Colorado, which is just not on brand for me.
It would be really awful for me if you gave what you could right now to fuel Debby’s people-powered campaign to flip this seat blue and replace me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=link_CTA2]
So don’t, OK?
Signed,
Lauren Boebert (parody)
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_bioboxlogo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_bioboxlogo]Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian for 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=btn_biobox]

name: Team Joe
subject: Grab a cup of ☕ and sit down with thisweek’s Team Joe newsletter, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Take a moment to read on to learn more about what the Biden-Harris Administration has been up to this past week → | | |
---
Happy Saturday, Peter! We’re here with the latest edition of your Team Joe Newsletter. **Read on to learn more about what the Biden-Harris administration has been up to this past week →**

* * *
**LOWERING HEALTH CARE COSTS** As a part of his Bidenomics program, President Biden recently announced reforms to crack down on junk health insurance plans, protect consumers against surprise medical billing, and lower costs for American seniors and families. **LOWERING CHILD CARE COSTS FOR WORKING FAMILIES**
Vice President Harris announced new measures aimed at lowering child care costs and supporting child care providers. These steps include strengthening the Child Care & Development Block Grant, which supports 1.5 million children and their families every month.
These changes would:
* Cap child care copayments for working families
* Improve financial stability for child care providers
* Make it easier for families to access the Child Care & Development Block Grant

These proposed changes are part of President Biden’s Bidenomics agenda to lower costs and make sure that more parents can find child care when and where they need it, all while supporting our country’s child care providers.

clean_body: Take a moment to read on to learn more about what the Biden-Harris Administration has been up to this past week → | | | Happy Saturday, Peter! We’re here with the latest edition of your Team Joe Newsletter. Read on to learn more about what the Biden-Harris administration has been up to this past week → LOWERING HEALTH CARE COSTS As a part of his Bidenomics program, President Biden recently announced reforms to crack down on junk health insurance plans, protect consumers against surprise medical billing, and lower costs for American seniors and families. These are critical steps to make sure consumers are not left with unexpected costs or left facing unfair medical debt. | | | INVESTING IN INFRASTRUCTURE The Biden-Harris administration has made the largest investment in climate resilience in our nation’s history. Projects like this ensure reliable water access, while maximizing water resources through investment in long-term infrastructure. They also help Americans navigate the impacts of drought and climate change. | | LOWERING CHILD CARE COSTS FOR WORKING FAMILIES Vice President Harris announced new measures aimed at lowering child care costs and supporting child care providers. These steps include strengthening the Child Care & Development Block Grant, which supports 1.5 million children and their families every month. These changes would: Cap child care copayments for working families Improve financial stability for child care providers Make it easier for families to access the Child Care & Development Block Grant These proposed changes are part of President Biden’s Bidenomics agenda to lower costs and make sure that more parents can find child care when and where they need it, all while supporting our country’s child care providers. | | UNLEASH YOUR DARK SIDE AND FIGHT MALARKEY! Peter, check out our ✨new✨ blue tee. This tee is perfect to wear while vanquishing malarkey! | | This American-made, union-printed tee is perfect for feeling good in the summer heat while supporting the Biden-Harris reelection campaign. HELP PRESIDENT BIDEN AND VICE-PRESIDENT HARRIS WIN FOUR MORE YEARS IN THE WHITE HOUSE Peter, your early support is essential. By donating now, you are supporting President Biden and Vice President Harris’s reelection campaign as they work to build their pathway to victory in 2024. Without your support, we won’t be able to set President Biden and Vice President Harris up for success with strong investments in swing states around the country. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Until next time, Team Joe | ---|---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This isn’t something I ever expected to do…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in mid-Missouri, running for office and becoming a politician was never part of my plan. So I wanted to take just a few moments today to share a little more about how we got here and why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**Will you please let me explain?**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)
Like so many other American families, mine lived paycheck-to-paycheck — and when my little sister was born with a heart condition, we went bankrupt.
Thanks to the generosity of our neighbors and people around town, we were able to get by. They helped me go to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they gave to me growing up.
But when I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I found a neighborhood that had been picked for parts — our neighborhood corner store boarded up, our first family home bulldozed to the ground. **Now it’s an empty lot.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)
While all of us were risking our lives to build up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians and corporate elites like Josh Hawley let towns and neighborhoods at home waste away. And then, after spending 20 years and $6.4 trillion on pointless forever wars and defense contractors, they couldn’t figure out how to invest a fraction of that amount back into our own country.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in this country.[And today, I’m asking for your support to make it happen.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)
**If you’re ready to take back power from the giant corporations and corrupt, career politicians who’ve waged economic warfare on our country, I need you on this team.[Can you add a $10 donation right now so we’ll have the resources we need to get our message in front of voters and flip this U.S. Senate seat? I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34962?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34961?refcode=em20230715-3402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3402%2E614464%2ESOQIK3)

Thanks for having my back in this fight, Peter. Together, we’ll take back power for working people and fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country.
Let’s flip this seat,
Lucas Kunce

clean_body: Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in mid-Missouri, running for office and becoming a politician was never part of my plan. So I wanted to take just a few moments today to share a little more about how we got here and why I’m running for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. Will you please let me explain? Like so many other American families, mine lived paycheck-to-paycheck — and when my little sister was born with a heart condition, we went bankrupt. Thanks to the generosity of our neighbors and people around town, we were able to get by. They helped me go to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they gave to me growing up. But when I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I found a neighborhood that had been picked for parts — our neighborhood corner store boarded up, our first family home bulldozed to the ground. Now it’s an empty lot. While all of us were risking our lives to build up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians and corporate elites like Josh Hawley let towns and neighborhoods at home waste away. And then, after spending 20 years and $6.4 trillion on pointless forever wars and defense contractors, they couldn’t figure out how to invest a fraction of that amount back into our own country. I’m running for U.S. Senate because it’s time everyday Missourians — people who know how to take care of each other — called the shots in this country. If you’re ready to take back power from the giant corporations and corrupt, career politicians who’ve waged economic warfare on our country, I need you on this team. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for having my back in this fight, Peter. Together, we’ll take back power for working people and fundamentally change who calls the shots in our country. Let’s flip this seat, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

Friend, In order to stop the corrupt, far-right majority on the Supreme Court from continuing to strip away our rights, we must urgently expand and reform the Supreme Court. That includes holding corrupt Justices accountable. **We just found out that multiple lawyers with cases before the Supreme Court sent payments by Venmo to Justice Clarence Thomas’s aide—including a lawyer who argued against affirmative action, which Thomas just voted to strike down.** This adds to a long list of clear conflicts of interests, including:
* Clarence Thomas voted for Trump’s Muslim ban while his wife worked for an organization supporting the ban.
* He voted against holding Trump accountable for the Jan 6th insurrection, after his wife actively advocated to overturn 2020’s election results (including directly pushing Trump’s Chief of Staff).
* He voted against the _Affordable Care Act_ while his wife was paid to lobby for its repeal.
* He voted to stop vote recounts in the 2000 presidential election while his wife was working with George W. Bush’s transition team.

* Clarence Thomas voted for the Muslim ban while his wife worked for an organization supporting the ban.
* He voted against holding Trump accountable for the Jan 6th insurrection, after his wife actively advocated to overturn 2020’s election results (including directly pushing Trump’s Chief of Staff).

subject: I simply cannot compete
