| | I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada. I needed to reach out directly, Peter: **GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.** Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his _rubber stamp_ in the Senate, voting for anything **including a national abortion ban.** I'm fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can't do it alone.****[**Will you chip in $15 or more now to help me keep Nevada blue?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66536092/416695640/-21268695?sourceid=1051466&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTM1OWFmYS0yMzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fuvRZR5wtJz2R8orkS3YVhDi72sRVhxGNyAjXKPHE=&emci=0f10a13d-7222-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=59359afa-2323-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

With experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, _The_ _Washington Post_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country — **and a recent poll shows me less than 2 points down**.

**This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter.**

I simply cannot compete with the GOP's massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. **In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing — so please, I'm humbly asking**: **Will you chip in as much as you can spare to my campaign? I'm counting on your urgent support to keep Nevada and the Senate blue:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/candidate/jacky-rosen/](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66536093/416695641/-21268695?sourceid=1051466&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTM1OWFmYS0yMzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16fuvRZR5wtJz2R8orkS3YVhDi72sRVhxGNyAjXKPHE=&emci=0f10a13d-7222-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=59359afa-2323-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** I'm lucky to have you on my team. Thank you.

— Jacky
Sen. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Time is running out! ACT NOW >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative,
Happy Saturday! I hope you’re enjoying a great weekend.

I wasn’t planning to reach out today, but I just got a text from my team – with just hours left on the clock until our midnight grassroots fundraising deadline, we still have $3,220 to go to reach our goal. **We can’t afford to fall short.**

[**_Please pitch in $5 or $10 to help put us over the top!_**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NM18yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0zJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/EAg-ovyHMPQdZ6A97OBc4g)

[**DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NM18yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0zJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/gbAMhm3Z86Eci3kFcFkcPg)
---
I’m under attack every single day. I’m counting on your help now more than ever.

Together, I know that we can **Keep Texas Red** , **take back the U.S. Senate from these unhinged radicals in Washington** , and **get our great nation back on track**!

I’m hard at work fighting for our future and I hope I can count on you at this critical time. [**Follow this link to make a secure online contribution >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NM18yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0zJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/q3dwFg_jNgL16qT_DHZxpQ)

For Liberty,

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Republicans are dead-set on flipping this seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| As I write this, the GOP is hand-picking their ideal candidate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
Peter — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in anything you can before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)** But first, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why the GOP is dead-set on flipping my Senate seat in Wisconsin. Some of the most competitive races in recent elections have taken place right here in Wisconsin — including last year’s Senate race, which Republican Ron Johnson won by _just one point_. Republicans only need to flip two seats to take control of the Senate, so they see this as the perfect opportunity to swoop in and pick up a seat. As I write this, they’re hand-picking their ideal candidate from a pool of self-funders who will use their own personal fortunes to unseat me. The GOP is right that this Senate seat is one of the most vulnerable, but they’re wrong to underestimate the power of this grassroots team. I know facing off against GOP candidates with personal war chests at their disposal might seem intimidating, but we’ve fought some tough battles before, and I’m confident that we can do it again. **[So, Peter, with that in mind, will you please consider adding a donation to help my reelection campaign reach our mid-month goal before the deadline tomorrow night?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jul23.4Adudz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-jul23.j37FLk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-jul23.R88tys&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-jul23.JT59uO&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-jul23.Mg_ASn&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=576%2E35263%2EYQLUIx)
---
The fight of us ahead won’t be easy. But together, I know we can cross the finish line to victory next year.
Thank you for everything.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66536509/416697295/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTczYzE0YS0yNTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSDL8UiRJXFcyari6_HmWFdBchIXA2ErdlKC8GXX5hA=)
This is outrageous, Peter.

**Over the past few weeks, the House GOP has repeatedly voted to strip reproductive healthcare from veterans and active duty service members.**

First, they approved a budget that would _prohibit abortion care at VA healthcare facilities_. The Senate blocked it, but now the far right is pushing to get it back on the table as McCarthy negotiates the 2024 budget. This would strip reproductive freedom from the 2 million women veterans who rely on the VA.

Now, they’re trying to sneak an amendment into the defense bill that would _restrict active-duty service members from taking leave for abortion care_. That’s right: the GOP wants to rip away reproductive freedom from active duty troops and veterans.

These recent steps from the GOP show how vital it is to elect pro-choice leaders in the post-Roe era. Reproductive rights remain under attack from the extreme right – but Rep. Eric Sorensen will do everything in his power to defend them, **especially those who put their lives on the line for our country.**

**[The urgency of electing advocates for reproductive freedom has never been more clear. Will you send in a grassroots donation to help keep Eric in office for another term so he can continue staunchly defending the right to choose?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66536510/416697296/2043242937?refcode=em-7.15.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTczYzE0YS0yNTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSDL8UiRJXFcyari6_HmWFdBchIXA2ErdlKC8GXX5hA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66536511/416697297/2043242937?refcode=em-7.15.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTczYzE0YS0yNTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSDL8UiRJXFcyari6_HmWFdBchIXA2ErdlKC8GXX5hA=)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Not just a ‘young person’ issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie’s recent message on student loan forgiveness and the Supreme Court
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)
Derek, we’re checking to make sure you caught Katie’s recent email on student loan forgiveness and the Supreme Court. We’re glad to see the Biden Administration has taken steps to ease the burden on student loan repayment for millions of Americans, but this fight isn’t over.
[**But first: A contribution of $5, $15, or $50 will make a huge difference in whether we’re able to hit our fundraising goal this month or risk being outraised by campaigns that have accepted checks from corporate PACs and lobbyists.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230715-1?refcode=EMAJ15_1_STU_20230715_V1_F&refcode2=26545_3422442_hsWTTj&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230715-1?refcode=EMAJ15_1_STU_20230715_V1_F&refcode2=26545_3422442_hsWTTj&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)**
—Team Katie Porter
**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Katie Porter [info@katieporter.com]
Date: Sunday, July 2, 2023
Subject: re: student loan forgiveness
Derek, I’m deeply disappointed in the Supreme Court’s decision to strike down Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan, but hopeful to see that this fight isn’t over.
Whether you went to college or not, whether you took out loans or not, whether you’re a Republican or a Democrat: **I’ve never met anyone who doesn’t want a stronger, more stable economy.** Canceling a portion of student loans is going to help us do that. **It will offer a massive boost to our nation’s entire economy.**
This isn’t just a “young person” issue. There are more than one million borrowers who are sixty or older—folks who took out loans to help their kids or grandkids, or who went back to school later in life. In fact, 70% of garnered Social Security goes towards student loan interest and fees (yes, interest and fees, not even the loan itself).
**This decision came as the final blow after a week of Supreme Court decisions turning back the clock on equality and threatening the strength of our economy.**
**This Supreme Court isn’t just conservative, it’s corrupt.** We should expand the court, enforce term limits, work to get politics out of our judicial system, and implement a judicial code of ethics.
This fight isn’t over: **[Can you add your name to my petition to show your support for student loan forgiveness?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kpem-20230715-student-loan-debt/?source=EMAJ15_1_STU_20230715_V1_F&t=2&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)**
**[Add my name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kpem-20230715-student-loan-debt/?source=EMAJ15_1_STU_20230715_V1_F&t=3&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ15_1_STU_20230715_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=26545_3422442_hsWTTj&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=26545%2E3422442%2EhsWTTj)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=262%2E52803%2E5_GXH_)

| | It’s been eight weeks since Angela launched her campaign for Senate, so I figured now would be a good time to give you the lay of the land, Peter. I like to break down this team’s success into three major categories: _1) Grassroots Momentum_ _2) Endorsements_ _3) A Great Ground Game_ **A strong campaign needs all three to win, and I’m proud to say we have that, but there’s still a lot of ground to cover between now and Election Day.** [**Would you please pitch in $25 to continue fueling Angela’s campaign all the way to victory?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3716?t=11&amount=25&akid=262%2E52803%2E5_GXH_) | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3716?t=12&amount=25&akid=262%2E52803%2E5_GXH_)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3716?t=13&amount=35&akid=262%2E52803%2E5_GXH_)
---
The first thing to highlight is our **grassroots momentum**. Since day one, this campaign has been fueled by small-dollar donations and a massive outpouring of support from folks all across Maryland and beyond.
Second, Angela has racked up **nearly 70 endorsements** from Maryland officials, which just goes to show what we’ve known all along: _Angela is the best-equipped candidate to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate._
Finally, our **unstoppable ground game** : Angela’s grassroots team of supporters have been the beating heart of this campaign from the very beginning. As we ramp up voter outreach, how we communicate with Marylanders will become that much more important.
[**We’re in the driver’s seat, but we need to keep connecting with Maryland voters early and often to spread Angela’s Maryland-first message far and wide. Can you chip in $25 to help do that?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3716?t=14&amount=25&akid=262%2E52803%2E5_GXH_)
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

clean_body: | | | It’s been eight weeks since Angela launched her campaign for Senate, so I figured now would be a good time to give you the lay of the land, Peter. I like to break down this team’s success into three major categories: 1) Grassroots Momentum 2) Endorsements 3) A Great Ground Game A strong campaign needs all three to win, and I’m proud to say we have that, but there’s still a lot of ground to cover between now and Election Day. | | | | | The first thing to highlight is our grassroots momentum. Since day one, this campaign has been fueled by small-dollar donations and a massive outpouring of support from folks all across Maryland and beyond. Second, Angela has racked up nearly 70 endorsements from Maryland officials, which just goes to show what we’ve known all along: Angela is the best-equipped candidate to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate. Finally, our unstoppable ground game : Angela’s grassroots team of supporters have been the beating heart of this campaign from the very beginning. As we ramp up voter outreach, how we communicate with Marylanders will become that much more important. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Peter — with your support, I’m confident we can win this thing. Dave Chase Campaign Manager Angela Alsobrooks for Senate | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Climate change is a pocketbook issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
The impacts of climate change are hurting communities. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66537742/416702673/197685099?refcode=EM_FR_230715ClimateChange_N_MK_30DO_4_NG_TESTA_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzhiOWFlOS0yODIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOM55MI5mahmMmhxKYeXR0CrwGLOkxwZXXQmgB6A4hY=)

It's National Parks and Recreation Month,friend, and I wanted to address our rapidly changing climate.

This summer's wildfire smoke, constant drought, and record-breaking heat make it clear: **the impacts of climate change are hurting communities like ours across the Heartland and Midwest.**

Our air quality has fallen, energy prices are rising, and Northwest Ohio farmers are facing increased drought conditions. Addressing our climate is more than politics. **It's about ensuring everyday Americans are financially prepared for the drastic changes we're already seeing.**

I’m fighting to ensure hard-working Americans don't feel the brunt of changes we're seeing in our climate. But if Democrats and Republicans don't come together to address our climate, we're bound to see these changes continue to cost us.

**[Will you join me in preparing for our climate's future by donating $5 today? Together we can take away Kevin McCarthy's gavel and elect leaders ready to lower energy costs and address our climate name: Representative Jennifer Longdon, ADLCC Board Chair
subject: This is NOT what we voted for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, a project of the Arizona Democratic Party
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo]
Hi friend,
I ran for office to solve some of the toughest challenges facing our state.
Instead, an increasingly far-right faction has taken over the AZ GOP and held our state hostage. Republicans in the legislature continue to attack our reproductive freedoms, our voting rights and our public schools. They push conspiracy theories, lies, and made-up controversies to distract from their lack of solutions to issues facing our state.
This is NOT what we voted for. We need strong leaders who fight to protect us, not push extremist agendas.
FLIP AZ BLUE
We must defeat them at the final place they hold power – the state legislature – and deliver a Democratic trifecta that works for Arizonans in 2024. The ADLCC is counting on your support to make sure we flip the legislature in 2024.
Every dollar you give helps us train, support, and elect Democrats into the AZ State Legislature in 2024. Will you donate $5 to elect more Democrats in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_WelcomeSeries_c]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the ADLCC will go through immediately:

HER Time is committed to electing more women and young people across the country. We’re determined in making sure our government acts to protect our fundamental rights — not to strip them away.

body:
These RINOs would happily sell out our country. | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ec4ca6f358d5450db1d56162af72a277&_e=PcpN_ZlT1cZUzjhiZav_y7HZ4TQ7VMxnTlHx2eL_Sc-JizAiysNJZX93cDY6DyRAo-MJqzgpHX2kNfy-o8GBv-ifAgOUXgnx4rXr09CHhKZ1htOcbc__eAUUBsGxI4YoKRDSnA235t2iOHLzt5qpe-kG2TXhz273mzhQ32eV-8I97Eq1L0vEubFqVZD7vOeVBSdvOD7Xf1btP1HoL8LwiSH8Oxyel38XQGpzCaQHWwknHdNi9i_azHD0ha8_gvaMNpVCIcPcRzFmw0D7DJ7ee5zMrIxwamuRBxoybf_ct8Jbb2bDdHWuKCH2-Dnlbz-CdWRsym1pAm6Pf2qEJuZxAKAWhuHE6_KBMOpZG0q3HEKNbVTfNS034yhdQmPzoPuv5oYvGT4yoDXFCbt593jFuKyGAG4hmKNqvkTDC1tjoPknhSzlf9ekEbol6cYSfNztF5zSOfRfo-lGJwbM_mECl_7g8Iq5jwVYmJibagVLET8OFwW2UAJUbL3MLFcJQHwc)
---
| | Friend,

---
Can you imagine running for President... _to NOT have the American people’s backs?_
---
But rather, to sell out your country to a bunch of special interest globalists.
---
Sadly, I’m not _just_ talking about Crooked Joe and the Marxist Democrats...
---
I’m also talking about the handful of treacherous “Republican” mega-donors (RINOs, as we call them) who’ve plotted to spend $370 MILLION to stop us in the primary and nominate their _Deep State-approved_ candidate.
---
You see, these special interest RINOs would rather _**_HELP_**_ Soros buy Crooked Joe another 4 years than see me return to the White House and put YOU first.
---
They hate me because they know I can’t be bought, bullied, or controlled.
---
_If anyone ever handed me a check with strings attached, I’d tear it to pieces and tell them to get lost._
---
**These RINOs know that our America First Movement will NEVER,**_**EVER**_**SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny** _**OR**_**to their special interest globalism.**
---
And, Friend, it terrifies them to their core!
---
**So now, as our campaign only continues to SURGE, these very same RINOs are holding**** _“crisis talks”_****in the Hamptons with their hand-picked candidate to plot a last-ditch scheme to stop us.**
---
_But I’m willing to bet our America First Movement has something to say about that... _
---

You see, these special interest RINOs would rather HELP Soros buy Crooked Joe another 4 years than see me return to the White House and put YOU first. These RINOs know that our America First Movement will NEVER,EVERSURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny ORto their special interest globalism. And, Friend, it terrifies them to their core! So now, as our campaign only continues to SURGE, these very same RINOs are holding “crisis talks”in the Hamptons with their hand-picked candidate to plot a last-ditch scheme to stop us. But I’m willing to bet our America First Movement has something to say about that... | | - Thank you, Donald J. $1 to protect Social Security and Medicare — which many of my GOP colleagues continue to quietly attack.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Eliminating racial discrimination means eliminating all of it.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=15732976cff04636b3c9109dc58296b7&_t=qF6t5b-hoRbAVDaJqtQPg5Tfmx0YHjiI2pC65LjxUq0rVNZKYxaidrrK88cipUms4km50Ji9FQo2Xlqb2F04jZx2pP5ttpz4ZAyGQ_OS3C0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=15732976cff04636b3c9109dc58296b7&_t=qF6t5b-hoRbAVDaJqtQPg5Tfmx0YHjiI2pC65LjxUq0rVNZKYxaidrrK88cipUms4km50Ji9FQo2Xlqb2F04jZx2pP5ttpz4ZAyGQ_OS3C0%3D)

**_TRUTH:_ Reverse racism is racism.**
**Fellow American - let me be clear; reverse racism is just pure racism.**

**It's wrong now just as it was in 1964.** It still rings true today, now that the Supreme Court finally ended one of the worst failed experiments in American history: _affirmative action._

Affirmative action isn't just institutionalized racism against white and Asian people. It's a form of racism against Black Americans, too. Institutions' decisions made on the basis of skin color are inherently not equal opportunities for all races. Along the way, America forgot that **diversity is not our strength; our strength is what *unifies* us across our diversity.**

I'm glad the Court acted, and America can finally start to put merit back into every institution, from our schools to our economy. **While the SCOTUS decision is a good one, there are still more challenges to overcome.**

If elected President, I have committed to repealing Lyndon Johnson's Executive Order 11246, which mandates that federal contractors - approximately 20% of the U.S. workforce - adopt race-based hiring preferences.

Today, we can celebrate a step towards an American identity. We can embrace meritocracy and excellence and reject the narratives of race-based victimhood. **[Together, Fellow American, we can accept the TRUTH- that a part of racism and discrimination in America has been eliminated.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=15732976cff04636b3c9109dc58296b7&_e=N4jBnB0cHRnXCKKpj_kJEtOyk2iDQGBRXzjtVRf9e7uUmHRkoYwmEAjK9huHkDc5wbXAZMBRIpN_7sZl7g0J5RjZcsQtWOepJIa9KFoUdG3RO3HqAejEB2qUajUAcdrr0RfozJRr51MqNZGEEqKf68P0IvIcjWoWalV0RHjJyiRy9NQvOj9O2nVY-s3D-k4tM3DL6XVSfs7tf6z64hRb6VRhVelURNOH6QpTaQsMjrTPlP69QRM-UC8or2Mbzcu0ZOACl2EA0xp-ZT_5_Nvy6Q2tMPrx2_L_Q8YyLSAKIqyu4tOTiUZmt6JqhthotnkIijs-obddpE_vU8GgVZO5QKwWMZHJl8XjTzICI_NZC0hB-na-s55AyAu-LEBrI8M9YDJBLPIRi0Dex9MdLvZQK8whLC0hoMKUlPGEqEVfC0cNnH2L21NcLeLd2ed8PSSxP9aNFbva6UuAZKp2GIBlNGB_ymiogHb0Jb_0ZqDCyd-LgkjLeeyO_Hw5p-s5vLFDvWAq-DhW7tqIsQUgbY_C5WTC1DD4_O5cSnpx8WcFbIA%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Leveraging power ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| |
## INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION
* * *
## **HEADLINES: Our Mission | Student Debt Town Hall | Ro Khanna Joins Our Activists | Wages, Climate, Healthcare | 1000 Progressives & Counting | Seattle Endorsements**** |** ** & MORE!**
★ ★ ★ [
](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=11&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=12&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **** As we approach **Our Revolution’s 8th Birthday** , let’s revisit the mission given to us by our founder **Bernie Sanders** : Organize and mobilize the grassroots behind policies and candidates that put people over corporate power.

Since 2016, we’ve elected over **1000 progressives** at every level of government, and our **popular policies** have majority, mainstream support.

And, heading into 2024, we have a concrete plan of action to leverage this power for real wins - because **progressives are now a key voting bloc** that can’t be ignored.

As Our Revolution Executive Director **Joseph Geevarghese told NPR’s Morning Edition** this week: _“Biden has got to fight like hell in the remaining period of time to show voters that he’s doing everything in his power to deliver on the pocketbook issues that matter to them.”_

That’s why Our Revolution is organizing our grassroots base to push NOW for actions that President Biden can deliver on like **student debt, climate, healthcare, wages,** and more — Democrats cannot fail to deliver at this moment.

[**Despite our corrupt political system, there is a path to victory on these critical issues, but it will take collective action and resources. Please pitch in a donation to support vital organizing work.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=13&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=14&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=15&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) News broke on Friday that **President Biden** canceled $39 Billion in student debt for 800,000 borrowers through administrative fixes.

This BIG WIN comes after Our Revolution hosted a **LIVE** [**Student Debt Town Hall**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8883?t=16&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **with Rep. Ro Khanna** where our members shared powerful stories and discussed our inside-outside push.

**The President can still use his executive authority to cancel debt, pause payments, and crack down on predatory lending practices.** [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=17&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) "The President should cancel student debt in the Higher Education Act. He should zero out the accounts,” **[Ro told us on Monday.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8875?t=18&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)** “If the Supreme Court rules against us then let’s see if they’ll actually enforce the collection of debt that has already been canceled.”

“Congress has given the Executive the power to do this. The President needs to push and invoke these authorities and cancel it," [**Ro said on the call.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8876?t=19&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) “We’ve got to be assertive at a time that the other side is taking action that is unconstitutional.” [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=20&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) While Rep. Khanna teams up with progressive lawmakers to work the levers of power from the inside, on a parallel outside track, we’re organizing our grassroots members to flood comments into the Secretary of Education to show the strength of our demand.

You can help! Submit your story online, explaining how restarting student debt will affect you and your family. Some of our members will even be featured at the live virtual hearing by the **Department of Education** on Tuesday!

Make sure to mention your activism with **Our Revolution** , and we will make sure your story is heard during this important rule-making process!

[**SUBMIT YOUR STUDENT DEBT STORY**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_relief/?t=21&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=22&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
Barbara Koehrer - an Our Revolution member since 2016 - spoke out at our Student Debt Town Hall on Monday. **[Barbara told us she owes $176,000](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8877?t=23&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)** and financially struggles to care for her aging parents. “The first time I felt financially free was due to the pandemic and the pausing of loan payments,” she said.

**[Virginia Spindler, 63, told us her family has $237,000 in student debt.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8878?t=24&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)** “We wanted our daughters to go to college and sold our house to help. If payments resume, we'll struggle with housing and food,” Virginia said. “It hurts to look at old family photos because it reminds me of what we've lost." [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=25&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **[Vanessa Torres, 36, told us she has $186,000 in student debt](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8882?t=26&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)** , mostly from law school. “I grew up very poor, often homeless, raised by a single mom dealing with addiction. I knew an education was the only way out of poverty for me,” she said.

“I got accepted to my dream school - Harvard - but now I can't afford the payments because rent has sky-rocketed. I worry about my siblings, and wish I could buy us a home so we’d always have a place to live,” Vanessa said.

These stories are painful — but more than getting angry, we need to get active. Restarting student debt - with interest - in the middle of an affordability crisis will be an economic disaster. Let's make sure the President delivers on his promise to 45 million Americans. ★ ★ ★ **Our Revolution** is waging major campaigns on the issues that matter most to our members in this moment of progressive leverage ahead of 2024: [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=27&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **Raise the Wage** \- Our Revolution is partnering with **One Fair Wage** to put a **$20+ MINIMUM WAGE** on the ballot in critical swing states like OH and AZ in 2024. Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have to choose between rent and groceries. [ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=28&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **End Fossil Fuels** \- The climate fight is heating up right now as Manchin, Sinema, and the GOP prepare to double down on fossil fuel drilling in must-pass bills this fall. Right now, we’re teaming up with our allies at **Greenpeace** and **Friends of the Earth** to make sure progressives in Congress have enough votes to block Big Oil. [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=29&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **End Medical Debt & Big Pharma Price Gouging** \- Bernie is leveraging his power as HELP Chair in the Senate to block nominees in exchange for lower drug prices, and our members are organizing on the outside to stop medical debt by taking on price-gouging hospitals and predatory debt collectors. ★ ★ ★ **ONE FAIR WAGE CHICAGO** [
](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=30&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) **Our Revolution** joined **One Fair Wage** and new Chicago **Mayor Brandon Johnson** \- who we helped elect! - for a [**Server for a Day**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8879?t=31&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) event at Netroots on Thursday.

The event is part of our campaign to get the Chicago City Council to pass an **$18 an hour minimum wage** and give Chicago workers a well-deserved pay raise — and not leave tipped workers behind! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=32&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
We mentioned at the top that **1000 Our Revolution-backed candidates** have been elected to public office - and we’re still just getting started!

While the 2024 presidential race is taking center stage in the media, we’re getting a jump start on making sure progressives pick up more House and Senate seats — including replacing corporatists like **Kyrsten Sinema** in Arizona.

Our voter mobilization strategy has been **battle-tested against billionaire SuperPACs** , and we have a proven record of winning 2 out of 3 races we’ve endorsed in.

[**We truly appreciate everyone who has invested in the success of Our Revolution, and hope you’ll pitch in now to give us a head start on the important races we must win in 2024.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=33&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=34&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) New endorsements rolling out in Washington State!

Our Revolution and Pramila Jayapal are backing **Jorge Baron** and **Teresa Mosqueda** for King County Council and **Tammy Morales** for Seattle City Council!

These endorsements were made with democratic input from Our Revolution members in Washington. Ballots dropped on Friday and election day is August 1st! ★ ★ ★
[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=35&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

**Bernie never gives up the fight, and neither do we!**
When you pitch in a donation of $10 ($5 if you’re already a monthly member), we’ll send you this iconic new Bernie sticker as our thanks.

[**HELP EXPAND OUR WORK!**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8880?t=36&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

★ ★ ★

[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8881?t=37&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

[**WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?t=38&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

★ ★ ★ |
---|---

* * *
[Facebook](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) | [Twitter](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=2&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) | [Instagram](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=3&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) | [Youtube](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=4&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) | [Website](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=5&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X) | [Sign Up](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=6&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
---
[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5919?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230715_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.qjauLk&t=7&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

****Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America.

[Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5920?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230715_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.s7JRYn&t=8&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

**** | [GIVE MONTHLY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5921?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230715_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.efapIj&t=9&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
---
****
**** [GIVE ONCE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5922?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230715_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.hxs9fH&t=10&akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe from Our Revolution's email list.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4457%2E5885482%2E1Hh_4X)

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Susan Wild
subject: my favorite summer recipe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I want to share with you one of my favorite summer recipes.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66540203/416710306/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230714-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk0ODE0Yi0yZjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBjdYbHbhkDO4WKBksDEYPLoJndhMj8yt3NzQ22h7VY=)
---
| Peter,

I’m sure you’re receiving a ton of emails talking about the “summer slump” and the impending mid-month deadline tomorrow, so instead, I want to share with you one of my favorite summer recipes. __[If you’d still like to donate, please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66540204/416710307/-1105104057?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230714-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTk0ODE0Yi0yZjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBjdYbHbhkDO4WKBksDEYPLoJndhMj8yt3NzQ22h7VY=)__

_**Mustard and Dill Potato Salad**_
_(perfect side dish for a summer BBQ!)_

**For the vinaigrette:**
* 1/2 cup extra-virgin olive oil
* 2 tablespoons brine from a jar of cornichons, gherkins or other small pickles, plus more as needed
* 1 tablespoon white or red wine vinegar, plus more as needed
* 1 heaping teaspoon mustard, such as Dijon
* 1 tablespoon to 2 tablespoons honey
* Kosher salt
* Freshly ground black pepper

**For the salad:**
* 1 1/2 pounds skin-on Yukon Gold or other yellow-fleshed potatoes, scrubbed and cut into bite-size pieces
* Kosher salt
* 8 cornichons, gherkins or other small pickles, finely chopped (about 1/2 cup)
* 1/2 cup minced fresh dill
* Freshly ground black pepper

**Directions:**

**Step 1**
For the vinaigrette: Combine the oil, pickle brine, vinegar, mustard and 1 tablespoon of the honey in a blender, mini food processor or in a lidded jar you can shake. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Blend or seal and shake to form a creamy, emulsified vinaigrette. This should take a minute or less. Taste and add more brine, vinegar or honey, a teaspoon or two at a time, as needed. The yield is 3/4 cup.

**Step 2**
For the salad: Put the potatoes in a pot with just enough water to cover them. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, add a large pinch of salt and then reduce the heat to medium or medium-low, so the water bubbles gently. Cook for about 15 minutes, until tender but still somewhat firm. Drain, rinse under cool water for a minute, then drain again.

**Step 3**
Toss the still-warm potatoes with the chopped cornichons and dill in a large bowl. Stir in 1/2 cup of the vinaigrette; let the salad sit for a few minutes, then taste. Add more of the vinaigrette and season with salt and pepper, until you are happy with the flavor.

**Step 4**
Serve right away, or cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour (to chill thoroughly) and up to 2 days.

I hope you enjoy it!!

Susan Wild

name: Governor Tim Walz via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in Minnesota
body:
Seize the moment
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e81ce89-8f0a-4f38-802a-7dee1778e46b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. **In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste.** So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. [If you are ready to embark on this journey with me as we look to defend and expand on our progress over the coming year and beyond, I’m asking you to join our movement by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb73461cf-bcb7-4bc8-9b15-a69ce68f81cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2ec6505-cdc3-490a-9fca-bf3abb75f9b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4388a58-74f9-4e5c-a2dd-2f664733cb4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ , if you’re with me, split a donation that works for you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us build this movement.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T391b4b54-9da5-4841-aaf6-98685892b011/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24a3d99c-cc80-4f9c-8bec-e9e8de7fc77d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2d14075-6e22-4fe2-95b5-c9a4ccd2ba15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: Seize the moment | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste. So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. | | | | | | | | I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. **That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **

Peter, five years ago, I made a promise to myself.
When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless, that I would speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this priorities survey is a key part of keeping it today. **
Peter, I will _never_ stop fighting for you and your loved ones. But to do my absolute best, I need to know what concerns matter to you most. **That’s why I’m counting on you to help me get 5,000 responses to my July Priorities Survey. **
**[_Please, will you take my priorities survey before midnight tonight?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66541518/416715326/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1128-su-nd&refcode=jtk1128-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4M2ZjYS0zMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_HK0ImANiI-4GDWgenJypoM0cVwUFgSEAzbJ-2P73I=&emci=7e1710d1-ec1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=51783fca-3123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66541520/416715328/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1128-su-nd&refcode=jtk1128-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4M2ZjYS0zMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_HK0ImANiI-4GDWgenJypoM0cVwUFgSEAzbJ-2P73I=&emci=7e1710d1-ec1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=51783fca-3123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

In recent months, we've put a stop to anti-abortion extremists, taken on the epidemic of senseless gun violence, and fought against record amounts of LGBTQ+ hate – all because my supporters told me how much those issues meant to them.
**But the year is halfway over – and I need your input as we look ahead to the rest of 2023.**
**So, please: I’m looking for 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities.[_Will you take 60 seconds now to share your biggest concerns with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66541523/416715332/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1128-su-nd&refcode=jtk1128-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4M2ZjYS0zMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_HK0ImANiI-4GDWgenJypoM0cVwUFgSEAzbJ-2P73I=&emci=7e1710d1-ec1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=51783fca-3123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66541524/416715334/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1128-su-nd&refcode=jtk1128-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc4M2ZjYS0zMTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_HK0ImANiI-4GDWgenJypoM0cVwUFgSEAzbJ-2P73I=&emci=7e1710d1-ec1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=51783fca-3123-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18997?t=1001&akid=3398%2E346206%2ENBZgJz ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18997?t=1002&akid=3398%2E346206%2ENBZgJz ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230715-3398-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3398_346206_NBZgJz&akid=3398%2E346206%2ENBZgJz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3398%2E346206%2ENBZgJz

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Landsman
subject: Greg doesn't take a cent of corporate PAC money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66541687/416716008/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.15_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTUzMWM4Mi0zMjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=glSQ-FV6isLd0eP60D1Atf923XYJEXrcWXreGDCHqv4=)
---
Team,

We know folks are sick and tired of politicians who place corporate and personal interests over the needs of the people they were elected to represent – and we are too.

**That’s why Greg pledged to not accept a cent of corporate PAC money. **His sole priority in Congress is fighting for folks like you and working to put money back in your pockets.

Not the pockets of pharmaceutical lobbyists.

Not the pockets of the gun manufacturers.

And not the pockets of any other special interest group – **_just the pockets of the hard-working folks here in Ohio._**

[**But that means, when it comes to raising the money our team will need to help Greg win another tough election, we have to rely on the power of this incredible grassroots team. Would you pitch in $5, or whatever feels right for you, to our people-powered campaign today? Peter, we wouldn’t email you if this wasn’t important.

We're only a few months away from the most competitive Mississippi election in decades, and we’re in the midst of a major fundraising _“summer slump.”_

We get it. It's summer — school's out, and people just want to kick back, relax and forget about politics.

But unlike many of the candidates running right now, Brandon’s race ISN’T IN 2024.

Election Day is less than FOUR MONTHS away in Mississippi, and we really need to keep our momentum up if we want to have a fighting chance to defeat Tate Reeves.

**So here's the deal: we only have about 24 hours left until our make-or-break mid-month deadline, and right now, we’re still $13,572 short of our $20,000 goal.

[If every person reading this email gives just $5 right away, we’ll help Brandon get back on track to hit our goal & defeat Tate in November. What do you say? clean_body: We only have 24 hours left to change the game. | = Peter, we wouldn’t email you if this wasn’t important. We're only a few months away from the most competitive Mississippi election in decades, and we’re in the midst of a major fundraising “summer slump.” We get it. It's summer — school's out, and people just want to kick back, relax and forget about politics. But unlike many of the candidates running right now, Brandon’s race ISN’T IN 2024. Election Day is less than FOUR MONTHS away in Mississippi, and we really need to keep our momentum up if we want to have a fighting chance to defeat Tate Reeves. So here's the deal: we only have about 24 hours left until our make-or-break mid-month deadline, and right now, we’re still $13,572 short of our $20,000 goal. = | = = Thank you, Peter. Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to _

I’ve spent my career fighting to defend the freedoms of every Pennsylvanian – and I’m not going to stop now.

As Governor, I’m working to expand access to care and ensure it’s patients and doctors making those critical health care decisions – not politicians. I’m working to protect LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians from discrimination. And I’m working to strengthen our elections and make it easier to vote, so we never again see the kind of assault on our democracy that we saw in 2020.

But it’s going to take all of us standing together to beat back the tide of extremism and ensure real freedom for everyone.

**So Derek, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight?**

name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Super PACs that want to maintain an unjust status quo are attacking Cori Bush
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
| |
---
Peter, Cori Bush isn’t afraid to call out human rights abuses, at home or abroad. **That’s why, when she held the apartheid Israeli government accountable for its recent attacks on a Palestinian refugee camp which killed children and adults, she was immediately attacked by the anti-Palestinian group AIPAC.** Last year, AIPAC and its affiliated groups opposed progressives in Democratic primaries, including Cori, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee, and now-former Congressman Andy Levin. AIPAC’s network of PACs spent over $41 million last year to defeat progressives, heavily funded by pro-Trump mega donors.[1] **In addition to being anti-Palestinian and anti-progressive, AIPAC is also anti-democracy:** In its first-ever set of endorsements, AIPAC’s PAC endorsed 109 insurrectionist Republicans who voted to overturn the will of the American people in 2020’s election. **Now AIPAC is targeting Cori. Let’s show Cori we have her back for taking courageous stands against oppression.** [**Can you chip in $5 now to have Cori Bush’s back in the midst of AIPAC’s attacks? Abigail prioritizes delivering for the people of Virginia, and we are proud to say the bipartisan infrastructure bill is providing for the people of Virginia. _**For example, $1.5 billion from the bipartisan infrastructure bill is headed to Virginia to expand broadband internet access!**_

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Shawn Wilson
**Date:** Jul 13, 2023
**Subject:** Peter, I’d like to tell you why I’m running for Governor.
> Peter, some of you know me very well, and some of you are just getting to know me better as a Democrat running for Governor of Louisiana. I am grateful you’re here and taking the time to read my message. My name is Shawn Wilson. I’m a father, grandfather, husband of 28 years, lifelong Democrat, and public servant. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66543234/416721384/218720461?refcode=em_WIL_FR_MM3-BioFwd_071523&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2Y2UyN2ItMzkyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hB2h0aP-N8Tzmvk38-6GfATDTND6npvg1FprK8QIAG4=)
> _That’s me with my wife and partner of 28 years, Rocki._ I’ve spent the last 25 years in state government, having been appointed or served in an executive role for three Governors and one Lieutenant Governor. Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development. When I was appointed to that role, Louisiana was facing record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds and hadn’t broken ground on many of the big infrastructure projects that we’ve needed for _decades_. So, we got to work bringing local, state, and federal leaders together in collaboration with business owners, farmers, and neighborhood associations. Together, we got things done and created the largest infrastructure investment in our state’s history. **The bottom line is this: I know and love Louisiana, and I have spent my career working to make our state better.** **_[Now more than ever, we need leaders who will build bridges, not burn them. That’s the kind of Governor I promise to be, but I need your help to get there. Please, will you join me in this fight with your first contribution before Saturday’s critical mid-month As mentioned in my previous email, my campaign has a critical fundraising deadline today, and we’re now just $2,755 short of our mid-month fundraising goal for July. But we only have a few hours left to hit it — something we can’t do without our supporters stepping up at this critical moment. = = = Thank you, Peter. With your help, we’ll continue building an election-winning campaign that will propel Louisiana forward. \- Shawn Wilson \----Original Message---- From: Shawn Wilson Date: Jul 13, 2023 Subject: Peter, I’d like to tell you why I’m running for Governor. Peter, some of you know me very well, and some of you are just getting to know me better as a Democrat running for Governor of Louisiana. I am grateful you’re here and taking the time to read my message. My name is Shawn Wilson. I’m a father, grandfather, husband of 28 years, lifelong Democrat, and public servant. = That’s me with my wife and partner of 28 years, Rocki. I’ve spent the last 25 years in state government, having been appointed or served in an executive role for three Governors and one Lieutenant Governor. Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development. When I was appointed to that role, Louisiana was facing record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds and hadn’t broken ground on many of the big infrastructure projects that we’ve needed for decades. So, we got to work bringing local, state, and federal leaders together in collaboration with business owners, farmers, and neighborhood associations. Together, we got things done and created the largest infrastructure investment in our state’s history. The bottom line is this: I know and love Louisiana, and I have spent my career working to make our state better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Shawn = | > Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes a few days to update. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. --- = = | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Our email program is an important way to reach our valued supporters, and this email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . If you would like to stop receiving emails from our campaign, please .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Unfortunately for Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2996%2E5257348%2EypdBpf ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek,

It’s Adam. I’m in between meetings right now, but I wanted to send you a
quick message: Tonight is our first fundraising deadline of the new FEC
quarter.

Last quarter, you helped our campaign respond to the relentless attacks
MAGA Republicans hurled my way while building what we hope will be the
largest grassroots campaign in the history of California. When Donald
Trump launched baseless attacks against me and his allies censured me for
doing my constitutional duty, you stood by my side. I am honored by the
more than 235,000 individual donations from supporters choosing to join
our campaign.

We all know Donald Trump isn’t going to allow the legal process in his
multiple criminal cases to play out quietly — he will attempt to place
himself above the rule of law, becoming even more emboldened to attack
anyone who has played an important role in holding him accountable.

Unfortunately for Trump, I’m not stopping now, and I never will. No matter
what he throws at me. It’s empowering to know I have you by my side
through it all,
Derek.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=july2023_abs_em.JwkbNx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230715_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2996%2E5257348%2EypdBpf ]Will you add a donation of $3 or more to help us start this new FEC
quarter? I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your grassroots
donation before tonight’s deadline will go a long way toward overcoming
MAGA attacks and winning this race — so we can create an economy that
works for everyone, protect our democracy, and save the planet.

Robert J. Raymond was born August 15, 1926, and attended high school in LaCrosse, Wisconsin. After high school, he enlisted in the Navy. He served on a destroyer during the Pacific Campaign and made it back home after World War II concluded.

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66544067/416724222/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY2ZmI3Mi0zYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8XbgvFpBAif8LjK8oe02VFsxtu2bewr5olLlxwRvOs=&emci=5e341e9e-bb20-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=52f6fb72-3a23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team — HUGE NEWS: workers in Maine scored a **major victory** earlier this week as Gov. Mills signed into law funding for a new paid family and medical leave policy for the state! _Make no mistake_ — this victory was made possible thanks to the hard work of the Maine People’s Alliance and organizers all across the state who collected more than 80,000 signatures to add a measure to the ballot that would enact paid leave policies for workers in the state. So, we’re calling this a HUGE win for workers as Maine becomes the 13th state to guarantee paid leave to its workers! clean_body: | | Team — HUGE NEWS: workers in Maine scored a major victory earlier this week as Gov. Mills signed into law funding for a new paid family and medical leave policy for the state! Make no mistake — this victory was made possible thanks to the hard work of the Maine People’s Alliance and organizers all across the state who collected more than 80,000 signatures to add a measure to the ballot that would enact paid leave policies for workers in the state. So, we’re calling this a HUGE win for workers as Maine becomes the 13th state to guarantee paid leave to its workers! = = Over the last few years we’ve seen workers and union organizers nationwide score some major wins in the fight to further worker protections. Capitalizing on this momentum is essential. After all, it was largely in part because of the action Mainers took that this policy even made it to the legislature — if we can do this in Maine, we know we can accomplish the same history-making progress across the country. Friend, did you hear what President Biden said about reproductive rights?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66544157/416724518/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4287-su-nd&refcode=jtk4287-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDM3MWMyYy0zYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6IJJXcsCSh_t-xicJKdmv09wES9cxY0XNY9wL2HHkEA=&emci=245e661b-5b22-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ed371c2c-3a23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
**Up and down the ballot, Republicans are pushing policies that would strip away our fundamental right to self-determination and privacy.** Fourteen states have already banned all abortions with no exceptions. Another 10 have enacted extreme restrictions that effectively make it impossible for women to access the care they need.
The next step in their plan is a _nationwide_ abortion ban. Far-right Senators have already introduced legislation to do just that — and Donald Trump has promised to sign it if he's elected.
**This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about an extremist minority dead-set on imposing their own religious views on the general public and stripping away the right to privacy. And friend, it's up to _us_ to stop them.**
That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up and committing to defend our Pro-Choice Senate Majority next fall. **As a reliable Democrat, President Biden and Sen. Gillibrand are counting on you to stand with them.**_[**So please, friend, will you add your name now to our petition before midnight tonight to tell far-right extremists that you're proud to be pro-choice?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66544158/416724519/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4287-su-nd&refcode=jtk4287-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDM3MWMyYy0zYTIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6IJJXcsCSh_t-xicJKdmv09wES9cxY0XNY9wL2HHkEA=&emci=245e661b-5b22-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ed371c2c-3a23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)_

clean_body: | | | Friend, did you hear what President Biden said about reproductive rights? Up and down the ballot, Republicans are pushing policies that would strip away our fundamental right to self-determination and privacy. Fourteen states have already banned all abortions with no exceptions. Another 10 have enacted extreme restrictions that effectively make it impossible for women to access the care they need. The next step in their plan is a nationwide abortion ban. Far-right Senators have already introduced legislation to do just that — and Donald Trump has promised to sign it if he's elected. This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about an extremist minority dead-set on imposing their own religious views on the general public and stripping away the right to privacy. And friend, it's up to us to stop them. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up and committing to defend our Pro-Choice Senate Majority next fall. As a reliable Democrat, President Biden and Sen. Gillibrand are counting on you to stand with them. | | Thank you, Team Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Team, when it comes to protecting our democracy and the right to vote, our country is facing a critical moment.

**On the one hand,** a recent decision from the U.S. Supreme Court reaffirmed the Voting Rights Act and upheld its role as an essential tool for making our democracy fairer and more representative.

**On the other hand,** since the 2020 election, nearly half of all states have passed new legislation restricting the right to vote – and even more legislation is still under consideration.

[**_It’s clear that our fight to defend access to the ballot box is far from over. That’s why we want to hear from some of our top supporters: Will you take just a few moments to complete our brief voting rights survey?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66544354/416725198/1285753928?refcode=EM_RTI_20230715_FR_7N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzNTY0NTkyLTNiMjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LQ26A3YZIxvQZwiuCIrPqhjW_0fHuUysWxjt8g1OE4A=&emci=45b30792-8c21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=63564592-3b23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)

Because we need you to [ chip in $7](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zW6mXl1tZOOh4oMMYR2EoR8oOz5hhivR77FXupVCzCJABeWHJLVhKuSFUqCqL9P_1ZlD74HWsHe2Yw4iXLfYr3aLXx_7g-hwyHyGi39QZYxFO85RQKmEUitT2qrCdzoK9CFogc2g4JcfzjXAxIxNgC71R3x2PLxE96MGyq4pE66DwLKydSSqSc9nwcfociKMF4SQ7tfPg6ydFGgNfDeej8jkKu0vohU2sL52qrwpHGraNrpKHK71XoKZ_AThc053lmJF1J3_HbP6WqlpyyEo1POCHTkofJ0oaR3oAXCAg8UTsx1UsA2CD9jNF3i9KHnPOKVgvYs1Uf_rIvnMbh8sCly07SEwCQlRmTAIlCo78JKokLpwZh8i4EuACq6CqAvts/3xw/NvQSVr1JSeWJ4PWE1ym1MA/h0/HKiqvohPt1p4mzCSsPShYdlWsyl9eBv9Z3A6n4FMGpY) to elect state Democrats to keep us on track to our July goal. Here’s why your support is so important:
* State Democrats have WON over a dozen special elections in 2023, defending our majority in the Pennsylvania House, winning a competitive election in New Hampshire, and flipping a seat from red to blue in the Virginia Senate.
* Next month, Rep. Pearson and Rep. Jones of the Tennessee Three are running again _after Republicans expelled them from the Tennessee House._
* And, in the New Hampshire House, we have two special elections on deck, which **_could make or break our chances to flip the chamber this year._**

**If we hit our fundraising goals,** we can harness Democratic enthusiasm into more wins – expanding our majorities. **But if we fail to reach our goals,** we could be outspent – giving Republican extremists a huge advantage. clean_body: We need you in this fight. | | | | | ❌ Don’t close this email. ❌ Don’t scroll away. ❌ Don’t check Facebook or Twitter. Because we need you to to elect state Democrats to keep us on track to our July goal. Here’s why your support is so important: State Democrats have WON over a dozen special elections in 2023, defending our majority in the Pennsylvania House, winning a competitive election in New Hampshire, and flipping a seat from red to blue in the Virginia Senate. Next month, Rep. Pearson and Rep. Jones of the Tennessee Three are running again after Republicans expelled them from the Tennessee House. And, in the New Hampshire House, we have two special elections on deck, which could make or break our chances to flip the chamber this year. If we hit our fundraising goals, we can harness Democratic enthusiasm into more wins – expanding our majorities. But if we fail to reach our goals, we could be outspent – giving Republican extremists a huge advantage. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We need you in this fight.
