I need to talk to you, friend.

_**The stakes have truly never been higher. The upcoming election is our opportunity to stand up for the principles that define us as conservatives and shape the future of our great nation.**_

I'm writing to you today to ask for your support. Grassroots donations are the backbone of our campaign and allow us to take our message directly to the American people.

**[Can you chip in $10 towards our Mid-Month fundraising goal today?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=d80aac6c69ba4674872d1f0db6dd9e44&_e=J-71cZhiTEY5Xe8XiukPNo-ZkDOh39qRbfBg1QU8L7hBL2HRvVHHwnRf9MOMdczWviJoU6MjmQXqmwnG5GoTKgjL2gSjkmRFUx7a6c-z2GyMFF58gZvUz4CHkJwuJ3WSceo98lePZz8OjAICRcDDnsR3RJL-yFlz1i7Wpb-2JKqk9UjS6-XrIIofefdecJnF1XBN5zSa67bQZ6sP-7fYkbdttFffzns7s2pth8N2XhIqOQ8R0pGvXZZjfqMxaFLSJ-o1Ggi4tKdC1EtYoFkgQPF_CBz8pjlMJ989iwINKGt57qcqdm35toexTOF8v3VZ)**

Please consider **[clicking this link now](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=d80aac6c69ba4674872d1f0db6dd9e44&_e=J-71cZhiTEY5Xe8XiukPNo-ZkDOh39qRbfBg1QU8L7hBL2HRvVHHwnRf9MOMdczWviJoU6MjmQXqmwnG5GoTKgjL2gSjkmRFUx7a6c-z2GyMFF58gZvUz4CHkJwuJ3WS8x9fwBS_Jet7YnNRB7KBzlQtGCxKIsoOuJCQQKKuLncWOrocwJh78Bj-mYexL09HjhYTXccnY0wMwUp3-6VQXBAZzS982sM8p80vxwFw7DuRaqhV3JqnBokozSAgtVqJudWQB4GUIjxsh5QExb3wQsPGXyTis03lcGWbfEtjcpSOGLwEsQMYQ2hp__Z-asuQ)** and contributing to our campaign. name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred

I need to raise $100,000 today → [] I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority. But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [] Let's do this. Colin Allred [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

| Peter, **Washington Republicans have coalesced around Dave Reichert in the past week or two.** It’s not surprising. He is a Republican through and through who **voted with Donald Trump 92.5% of the time.** What is surprising is that Reichert is trying to distance himself from his record. While there is always room to come together across party lines and solve a problem, there are some issues that Hilary believes we should never compromise on. **An issue Hilary will never compromise on is access to reproductive healthcare. It’s non-negotiable. Dave Reichert is anti-abortion,** and as national Republican groups attempt to pass increasingly strict federal abortion laws, we need a leader willing to fight for abortion access. **Dave Reichert is not the leader Washington needs. ** _**[If you believe in the right to choose and believe your leaders should fight with every fiber of their being to preserve reproductive rights, then please consider chipping in today to elect Hilary Franz, the proud female pro-choice candidate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66545891/416730691/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230715-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE4ZTI2NDktNDMyMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h90AL2FwjUqqLnmDPFxhVp_a3PeQv3j-3lLpOCcGWMY=)**_

clean_body: We have until tonight to get our fundraising back on track, so we’re counting on your support. | Peter, Did you see Kurt’s message on Thursday? We have until tonight to get our fundraising back on track, so we’re counting on your support. With AZ-01 already being rated a toss-up by multiple experts and Schweikert having a headstart on fundraising earlier this year, we need your help to close the gap. Next year’s election will undoubtedly be extremely competitive, unpredictable, and highly expensive, so we need to put in the work now to ensure we’re ready for anything Republicans throw our way. = | = Read more from Kurt below: = Peter, We’re nearly halfway through this month, but we’re not on track to meet our monthly fundraising goal. | = Our campaign is completely grassroots, which means we rely solely on small-dollar contributions from folks like you to fund our campaign instead of a few big checks from corporations. So, it’s important for our campaign to stay on track every month to ensure we’re able to invest in the critical resources we’ll need to flip this district from red to blue. Democrats came close to flipping this seat last year. subject: Making sure this summer counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I aim to hit the trail as much as possible for downballot candidates.

Hi – I hope you’re getting a chance to enjoy this beautiful summer weekend!

I wanted to quickly check in because my team is making sure that we can take full advantage of this season to campaign for Virginia Democrats in key state legislative races. [**Will you help us meet our mid-month today by chipping in $10 (or whatever you can) by midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66546082/416731416/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230715MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2IyNDZmMy00MzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqlGxZhmY_x8ePJfTdChIV_hI_3Wgrqux0PSt62agKs=)

Glenn Youngkin’s national ambitions mean that this year’s state elections will be costly, unpredictable, and filled with negative attacks and misinformation. I’m planning to get on the trail as much as possible on behalf of our incredible downballot candidates and ensure that voters get the truth.

The future of reproductive freedom in Virginia is on the line if Democrats come up short. So I’m taking nothing for granted.

**Please join me and chip in $10 here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_va-lege23**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66546083/416731417/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230715MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2IyNDZmMy00MzIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqlGxZhmY_x8ePJfTdChIV_hI_3Wgrqux0PSt62agKs=)

Thanks so much!

Jennifer

clean_body: | | | Peter, The Left wants you to ignore this email, but I’m counting on you to keep reading. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats have made it clear: they’ll do WHATEVER it takes to stop me. They’re throwing all of their resources behind my opponent, and if we’re going to catch up, we have to move - and we have to move quickly. We need 253 more patriots to step up before to meet my mid-month deadline. I’m not afraid to take the radical Left head-on, Peter. They may have Silicon Valley and Hollywood behind them, but I have the most powerful weapon of all: hardworking, all-American patriots like you. Now I need you to step up more than EVER. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Hey there – it’s the Finance Team @ Salinas HQ.
At the midpoint of every month, our team does a fundraising deep-dive to assess whether we’re on track to finish the month strong.

**Well, we just finished our mid-July deep dive and it’s clear we’re experiencing a serious dip in grassroots fundraising.** And if we don’t turn things around quickly, we run the risk of falling short at the end of the month.

[**We set a goal of raising $4,000 online in the next 72-hours to ensure we can get back on track, but we’ll need your help to do so. That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $10 or more before Monday night?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66546132/416731502/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.15_b1_faasdc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjVkMGE4Ny00NDIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmoFPEciaPOL-4MmzB6ph5NzyiBBjFaE060NoY0yLjg=)

Look, no one individual donation _alone_ won’t win the election. But when our grassroots supporters come together to chip in what they can, when they can, it all adds up.

**Bottom line: If everyone reading this email chips in $10, we’ll be back on track to meet our July goals – _and re-elect Andrea_ – in no time.**

[**In a race as competitive as ours, every dollar counts. So please, can we count on you to chip in $10 (or more!) to help us get back on track before Monday night?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66546134/416731504/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.15_b1_faasdc_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjVkMGE4Ny00NDIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmoFPEciaPOL-4MmzB6ph5NzyiBBjFaE060NoY0yLjg=)

clean_body: At the midpoint of every month, our team does a fundraising deep-dive to assess whether we’re on track to finish the month strong. Well, we just finished our mid-July deep dive and it’s clear we’re experiencing a serious dip in grassroots fundraising. = Hey there – it’s the Finance Team @ Salinas HQ. At the midpoint of every month, our team does a fundraising deep-dive to assess whether we’re on track to finish the month strong. Well, we just finished our mid-July deep dive and it’s clear we’re experiencing a serious dip in grassroots fundraising. And if we don’t turn things around quickly, we run the risk of falling short at the end of the month. = | = Look, no one individual donation alone won’t win the election. But when our grassroots supporters come together to chip in what they can, when they can, it all adds up. Bottom line: If everyone reading this email chips in $10, we’ll be back on track to meet our July goals – and re-elect Andrea – in no time. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = As always, thank you so much for being a part of this grassroots campaign. Andrea and our entire team are eternally grateful for your support. – Finance Team @ Salinas HQ | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s going to come down to the wire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Our work to elect progressive champions and transform the Democratic Party
from the inside out hinges on our grassroots fundraising. We don’t take a
single dime from corporate PACs and it shows: our average donation this
month is just $16.

We’re facing our mid-month fundraising deadline in less than 12 hours and
if three supporters from 18326 each chip in $3
then we’ll be able to reach our $35,000 fundraising goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135819?refcode=em20230715-29905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U ]Will you be one of the folks from 18326 to make a
$3 contribution right now? We’re so thankful for any amount
that you can afford to donate today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135819?refcode=em20230715-29905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U ]Donate $3

We’re building a solid base of progressives in Congress fighting for
Medicare for All, racial justice, a Green New Deal — and we’re doing it
with an incredibly low budget. But we need your support to keep our work
going.

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230715-29905-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29905_1203867_xbqY9U&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29905%2E1203867%2ExbqY9U

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: Meet NavJosh our rising star
body:
Team McDow continuning to engage the community!
| | |
---
---
|
---
| | Greetings Friends!
The campaign is gaining steam and we are now talking to two Political Action Committees about endorsements. Team McDow is communicating with many more for potential endorsements.
Young-people in this country are experiencing an unprecedented mental health crisis.
Our Teen & Young Adult researcher was charged back in March to learn what the key issues are amongst teens and young adults and report out. Below is what Mr. NavJosh Sandhu reported.
We are now forming what the next generation of my Character Development Initiative & Policy looks like and his data is essential. This policy was originally led by Dr. Edwin Powell who ran for city council in Washington, DC. I worked on his campaign in 2014 and helped write his then signature policy. I want to pick up where he left off and make it federal law. If you have any feedback about what you would like to see in a youth character development initiative or policy, please email me at: [votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com](mailto:votestephen@mcdowforcongress.com).
More about the campaign: [www.mcdowforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0M_GJs_5zXqssIKth6Gj9Pc-Exyj0IOH_6FwrDqR6C8thEZkxKngomiyhN_SfIjgrzObb3roIX0JZXOk1IPGXqXfW94PDjSD_OsfBOjBTMOQ&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==).

Best,
Stephen
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# Youth's Challenges:
# Mental Health, Disillusionment & Relationships
By NavJosh Sandhu Teen & Young Adult Researcher Northwest High School Graduate (Germantown, MD) University of Maryland, Baltimore County Student
---
|
---
| Mental Health
Factors: Academic pressure, social media influence, financial stress, and societal expectations. Issues: Depression, eating disorders, self-harm, substance abuse:
Academic Pressure: High expectations from parents, competition for college admissions, and the fear of failure, leading to stress, burnout and mental health disorders.
Social Media Influence: The constant exposure to the curated online lives, cyberbullying, impractical projection of online "stars", and social comparisons can lead to low self-esteem, anxiety, and depression.
Financial Stress: Student loans, and difficulties finding stable employment can lead to anxiety and depression.
Societal Expectations: Regarding career choices, relationships, and personal achievements, and struggling to meet their expectations can result in feelings of inadequacy, little to no self-worth, and mental health challenges.
---
| | Disillusionment
Issues: Feelings of disappointment, loss of trust, or skepticism towards societal foundations, systems, and/or ideals: Political: Younger audiences perceive the political system as corrupted, lacking representation, or feel as if their voice is not heard leading to apathy or disengagement from political processes.
Economic: Job instability, income inequality, and difficulties accessing affordable housing or healthcare. The sense of economic disillusionment can lead to brief feelings that upward mobility is unattainable.
Social Justice & Equality: Issues related to racial inequality, gender discrimination, LGBTQ+ rights, and social justice justice contributes to the younger populations desire for a fairer and a more inclusive society.
Relationships
Issues: Peer Positive Friendships foster support, companionship, and a sense of belonging. Challenges like peer pressure, bullying, or social exclusion negatively affect mental health and self-esteem.
Romantic: Young adults engage in romantic relationships to bring joy and fulfillment, which may lead to sexual, physical, and mental abuse, as well as toxic dynamics.
Online: While online relationships offer connection and support, they carry risks, such as cyberbullying, online harassment, and the potential of exploitation.
---
|
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0HS8RK8NJJlMcKFxjQtfYERJgBRdi2_pWe7ACYPgHxwyHrUrJ8hXr5E5FclX1Fgpx05iJWliOcklnMIncNbIoLJSnjh07Et9_z3a-p9yJ2XV5p5sOZApfaI=&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0LkyDHIwXkAJeJ17xAYLOjvP4m_o5XeZiprFFhp86ufaDq3UqDSGJHFYOhB5Hww8GuVgrnuTjx7WHOWfiQTaSPJkBnJ04Wztl4zH_Pqz4dno&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0LkyDHIwXkAJ_ztA11-_MJGSp-3TPDpe6ktrMj21bZnGtnHnEZIfv80OIN4np3MZ7I-41ZvumWrXSufIh4FL6R7qCN_mbi-Hs2Hy2lzb9ehZUM2miA4PjbF33ql15ZwTkQ==&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0LkyDHIwXkAJ8Y0OF4UofCxmBGWe31X7CeVgMC2Ayg2XqSrfazVaiuyzsVsdlIlr8mzormMIrv7aNto05nSYvDy1qGICEvYSowCXNvSzTel1uLUANP_C2aE=&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0HS8RK8NJJlMcMhLWyPtp1DumpivtJ-jhPyplpn3mo3_f4Vjit0oj3qtpeRc_AIiA0RhCpwbWQL6BgzxtX-oP3kY8cw9RiqxBfVZnt3CGA-HcxsMh3V9GjY=&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O5lEijrD_Joln1UwegbJ2aK54O1V2KE_FDSdY0D99_SrrB7tyNav0LkyDHIwXkAJLII490dwfbep72IWq0QWvvMdmKTVrfeE2rDwGS-pu9uGZ0HcjaO3RO7Mp6RlZct1gWu05WRboswLxp3Scd02iDN6Dd3oiNwx7p_7_eIoi6lpNzRmrPKw5R8m5Sihp6dB&c=Ov99An0zFjNyMY9XGi12OD34l9GwoCh3GnOznvpz9-_xu7B867M_LQ==&ch=yLeGj72TTl6BlIuzWBcJGkXTU5r1otpbln60vQGT6zR8WO_JLYAzxA==)

name: American Action News

subject: defeating Ted Cruz is too important for us to come up short

body:
| Friend, this race is simply too important for us to come up short. [Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So please, split a donation of $10 before midnight between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us flip TX blue! →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49579?t=6&akid=9194%2E878179%2EjKd-xC)

** _FIRST,_** Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!

**_THEN,_** experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican seat to a BATTLEGROUND.

**_NOW,_ a brand-new poll shows Colin is just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, and 14% of voters are still undecided!**

It's crystal clear: Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator, and we've got a real chance of flipping this seat – which would all but guarantee Democrats hold onto our critical Senate majority. But it's not going to be easy, and **Colin's counting on YOUR grassroots support to give him the resources to fire Ted Cruz next November.** [We cannot afford to fall short, so please, before midnight, rush $10 or more between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49579?t=7&akid=9194%2E878179%2EjKd-xC) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49580?t=8&akid=9194%2E878179%2EjKd-xC)

Hello,
Tonight at midnight, we’re facing the most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet since we launched our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert.
You’ve probably heard about these deadlines from other campaigns before.
Here’s why they’re so important: We have to make budget decisions about how much we can invest early in this race. Each month, my team goes through the numbers to see if we can afford to execute on the plan we’ve come up with to defeat Lauren Boebert.
**I only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in 2022. We can close the gap and win in 2024, but her Super PACs are going to come at me with everything they can. We cannot afford to fall short of our $200,000 mid-July fundraising goal – not if we want to win.**

clean_body: Tonight at midnight, we’re facing the most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet since we launched our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines from other campaigns before. Hello, Tonight at midnight, we’re facing the most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet since we launched our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines from other campaigns before. Here’s why they’re so important: We have to make budget decisions about how much we can invest early in this race. Each month, my team goes through the numbers to see if we can afford to execute on the plan we’ve come up with to defeat Lauren Boebert. I only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in 2022. We can close the gap and win in 2024, but her Super PACs are going to come at me with everything they can. We cannot afford to fall short of our $200,000 mid-July fundraising goal – not if we want to win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Ours was the closest race in the entire country last year. We can finish the job and win, but I am counting on your continued support. Thank you so much for everything you do. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Al Franken
subject: why I support Josh Riley — and you should too!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18810?t=6&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Ron Be Gone and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18810?t=7&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)

Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District, a key district to taking back the House. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, NY-19 is considered a tossup and one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Ron Be Gone and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18810?t=8&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18811?t=9&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18812?t=10&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18813?t=11&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18814?t=12&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18815?t=13&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works!**[DONATE HERE.](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18810?t=14&akid=1908%2E564421%2EeAZVIs)**

| Dear Patriot, Our values are under siege. The fight for the American dream is real. America is on life-support after the last three years of radical Marxism policies. We must learn from our past, in order to be able to succeed in the future. No other book offers such a rare and candid glimpse like my new book – Letters to Trump.

| I write today because I’d like to send you a copy. This book reveals part of my incredible private correspondence with world leaders, celebrities, religious icons, athletes, and titans of business. Every letter in it – and there are many – has been handpicked by me and includes my personal commentary. President Ronald Reagan. President Richard Nixon. Princess Diana. Hillary Clinton (neither a president nor a princess). My private correspondence with Rev. Billy Graham, Bob Hope, Jack Nicklaus, and Clint Eastwood.

| Even the letter I sent to James Comey firing him as FBI director. It’s all here. This book covers not only my first term in the White House, but the last 40 years as well – giving a never-seen-before glimpse into history. You can see who’s a hypocrite and who stuck by me through thick and thin, and even who predicted I would become president one day (hint: page 10). Sadly, now our country is collapsing on a scale never seen before. And yet the Democrats and the Fake News spin away. They actually want to fool people into forgetting everything that you and I accomplished over four years and how much better their lives were... like it never happened. It’s pathetic, really.

Because your name was on the list I was given of my truly best supporters, I am instructing my publishers to do two things: First, reserve a copy exclusively for you; and Second, make this copy available to you at a $20 markdown as my way of saying thank you. I promise you’ll love this book. Simply enter the code: WINNING at checkout to receive this special promotion!

clean_body: Listen. | | | | Can't see this email? | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Our values are under siege. The fight for the American dream is real. America is on life-support after the last three years of radical Marxism policies. We must learn from our past, in order to be able to succeed in the future. No other book offers such a rare and candid glimpse like my new book – Letters to Trump. | | | I write today because I’d like to send you a copy. This book reveals part of my incredible private correspondence with world leaders, celebrities, religious icons, athletes, and titans of business. Every letter in it – and there are many – has been handpicked by me and includes my personal commentary. President Ronald Reagan. President Richard Nixon. Princess Diana. Hillary Clinton (neither a president nor a princess). My private correspondence with Rev. Billy Graham, Bob Hope, Jack Nicklaus, and Clint Eastwood. | | | Even the letter I sent to James Comey firing him as FBI director. It’s all here. This book covers not only my first term in the White House, but the last 40 years as well – giving a never-seen-before glimpse into history. You can see who’s a hypocrite and who stuck by me through thick and thin, and even who predicted I would become president one day (hint: page 10). Sadly, now our country is collapsing on a scale never seen before. And yet the Democrats and the Fake News spin away. They actually want to fool people into forgetting everything that you and I accomplished over four years and how much better their lives were... like it never happened. It’s pathetic, really. | | | My friend, you and I cannot let them get away with rewriting history and telling our story (and shifting the blame for their ineptitude). That’s why this book is so important. That’s why you really need your own copy. Good news. These books are back in stock. Even better news. Because your name was on the list I was given of my truly best supporters, I am instructing my publishers to do two things: First, reserve a copy exclusively for you; and Second, make this copy available to you at a $20 markdown as my way of saying thank you. I promise you’ll love this book. Simply enter the code: WINNING at checkout to receive this special promotion! | | | I know the sacrifices you made so that the scenes contained in it could even be possible. For that, I cherish you. I really do. Sincerely, | | | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States of America | | FOLLOW US! | | No longer want to receive these emails? . Winning Team Publishing 520 Beau Pre Rd Lafayette, Louisiana 70508

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: 3 hours left to double your impact
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We REALLY hoped we'd never have to send this email, Friend, but our worst-case scenario came true: **We are short of our World Orca Day fundraising goal** , and we need your support to reach this crucial milestone.

We can't accept this shortfall, not now. **The last 75 Southern Resident orcas are endangered and suffering** , and Big Polluters are still destroying our planet for private profit. With so much at stake, we are EXTENDING our World Orca Day matching gift opportunity. A generous group of donors will still match your gift up to our $90,000 goal -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. Here's where your record stands: | | ⚠️ **Incomplete Donation Record**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com** **ORCA DAY DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878499?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 2 MORE**
---
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878500?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Extension expires 11:59 p.m._
---
This isn't about pride or proving a point. We set our $90,000 goal because that's what it takes to secure the survival of our planet. Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect orcas, our waterways, and our planet. And every single dollar has a job to do -- a job that gets infinitely harder if we don't close this budget gap.

Because here's the thing, Friend: **Falling short means cutting back on our work** \-- and the planet can't afford that. That's why this giving extension is so critical. We fight as hard as we can every day, but that fight is fueled by you. That means when we set these goals, we're counting on you to step up. Endangered Southern Resident orcas and the planet are counting on you.

Time is running out for this giving opportunity – and for our planet. So please -- don't wait a moment longer, because the Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more. **We only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, so please:** **[Rush your $27 membership donation now and double your impact to protect orcas and save the Earth!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1878501?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Morgan via AZ Dems
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Folks — Thank you.

Because of your support, we were able to smash our $18,000 end-of-quarter goal and build on our strategy to fight for Democrats across Arizona though 2024.

But do you want to know what I’m proudest of?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-july23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-july23]

On average, folks chipped in $35.23 to help us get to where we needed to be.

We didn’t reach our biggest goal yet this year by cashing big checks tied to an agenda, we got there $5 and $10 at a time from everyday people across Arizona who are ready to take back the House and protect our razor-thin Senate majority.

We can’t fight for a blue Arizona without you. Thank you again for your continued support.

Morgan Dick

Executive Director

Arizona Democratic Party

P.S. If you missed your opportunity to pitch-in before the deadline, please make a contribution today to help us invest in Democrats up and down the ballot across Arizona in the coming weeks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-july23]
Arizona Democrats
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Earlier today, Andy reached out about why it's important we finish our mid-month deadline strong. Peter,

Earlier today, Andy reached out about why it's important we finish our mid-month deadline strong. Since then, this grassroots team has really stepped up to help us in these final hours – but with this race still neck-and-neck, we can't take our foot off the gas now.

[**Take a moment to read Andy's note below, then chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight to help Andy protect Kentucky's progress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66552373/416743551/950424521?refcode=em23_230715_ddln7_fndd_gq_act_fwd_ehtb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230715_ddln7_fndd_gq_act_fwd_ehtb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c574c602-5b23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTc0YzYwMi01YjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=guY3ZVtGlPuIOS4VXNVtAeprrKzICGPF6OOrU4oF9ok=)

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Andy (personal) <info@andybeshear.com>
Subject: Can I share a few things with you?
Date: Saturday, July 15, 2023 Hey folks,

We're just hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. I wanted to take a moment to share some of the latest news in our race and why it's important we end this deadline strong and keep our fundraising on pace.

With less than four months until Election Day, this race remains tight. A Republican poll shows I'm tied with my opponent and election experts are predicting this will be the most competitive race in the entire country this year.

My opponent and his allies take this news as a sign they can defeat me and undo the progress we've made for Kentucky. That's why they're spending millions to attack me. Finishing our mid-month deadline on a strong note ensures we have the resources to fight back and pull ahead.

**But, team, we can't do that without your support. Will you please chip in before our mid-month deadline at midnight so we can win this tough race and continue making progress for Kentucky? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-july-23?refcode2=personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66552374/416743554/950424521?refcode=em23_230715_ddln7_fndd_gq_act_fwd_ehtb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230715_ddln7_fndd_gq_act_fwd_ehtb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c574c602-5b23-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTc0YzYwMi01YjIzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=guY3ZVtGlPuIOS4VXNVtAeprrKzICGPF6OOrU4oF9ok=)**

Thank you,

Andy

Ever since they announced their plot against our America First Movement, we've only GROWN our already massive leads to more than 30 points in nearly every early primary state... ... Not to mention our now 20-POINT LEAD in the great state of Florida! But with alarm bells going off for these treacherous RINOs, leaked reports show they 're now holding " crisis talks" out in the Hamptons to plot a last-ditch scheme to stop us. Friend, now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. We MUST continue to counter their plots and dark money schemes at every turn. And fortunately, for a movement like ours - 75 MILLION Americans strong - even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs. | | Thank you, | Donald J. **Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64b317e5ede63027065e7495&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64b314e8304aad35781d15fc&l=en-US&s=g2lkEoMoUi_XuF70B8TIYpgV2yI%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64b317e5ede63027065e7495&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64b314e8304aad35781d15fc&l=en-US&s=ujudcjhtbFTvWcmbcMSdbpjbCSI%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: The power of $7...
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Wisconsin, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
It's all about being "equitable".
It's all about being "equitable". No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aqukld-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* [Kamala talks tech!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-y/)
* [The DOJ is now indicting whistleblowers.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-j/)
* [Mayorkas is failing at his constitutional responsibilities.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-t/)
* [Cluster munitions for Ukraine? The former President has thoughts.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-i/)
* [Why is China's military training children?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-d/)
* [Democrats in California now think that prison sentences should be "equitable".](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-h/)
* [Not everyone in the Democrat party is pleased with Biden.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-k/)
* [Defund the salaries of Biden officials?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-u/)
* [If you are a responsible human being you may be a white supremacist.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-o/)
* [America is running out of ammunition, but Ukraine is doing just fine.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-x/)
* [UFC's Dana White encourages everyone to see "Sound of Freedom".](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-m/)
* [Karine Jean-Pierre stokes division on national TV.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-c/)
* [Mike Rosen has had it with "pride".](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-q/)

### **Social Justice Above All Else**
California's new math framework prioritizes "equitable outcomes" over, you know, correct answers.
### **The instigators at the FBI**
[FBI Agents pushed informants to buy weapons so that the agency could expand their violent extremist investigations](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-a/), and inflate the data. They have a desired outcome, and will do whatever it takes to achieve it. **Election integrity?** [Ohio is launching an election integrity office to ensure safe elections.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aqukld-trhiujldw-f/) I thought that's what Secretaries of State, and county clerks were suppose to do to begin with. And as one of President Trump’s most loyal supporters, we couldn’t possibly imagine our Donor Wall Plaque without YOUR NAME etched within... | | Because there’s such a limited number of slots, we’re asking donors to make a $75 contribution to get your name etched in the Wall. But, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, YOUR NAME will be inscribed in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tues, July 11, 2023 Subject: THANK YOU To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend – THANK YOU! Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country’s best days – despite the Democrats’ every effort – are still to come. It’s because of my incredible supporters like YOU that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever. With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE. | And it’s because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than 30 POINTS in nearly EVERY early primary state. Which is why I’d like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire! And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. | | I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Ruben

name: GFIOhio - Mark Pukita
subject: 🔥 CALL TO ACTION! • VOTE YES AUGUST 8, 2023! • OHIO BALLOT ISSUE 1! 🔥
body:
Hi!

This is a very short “Call to Action” request by the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI). We need your help! **WE NEED VOLUNTEERS TO MAKE CALLS TO PASTORS WITH US!
**
Ohio has a special election on August 8th with one question to answer: **Ohio Issue 1**. We need people to vote **YES** on Issue 1, especially if they are pro-Gun, pro-Kids, pro-Life, and pro-Freedom. I’ve attached a brief explanation of what’s at stake for Ohio with Issue 1. As well, you can watch videos and find more information here:

[GFIOhio.com/issue1](https://gfiohio.com/issue1)

We’re working on contacting as many pastors of as many Ohio churches as possible. We have an information “kit” you’ll send them (by email) to use with their congregation once you connect with them. In this way, we multiply our efforts to get Issue 1 passed by leveraging pastors to engage with their churches on this important topic.

**WE NEED VOLUNTEERS TO MAKE CALLS TO PASTORS WITH US!
**
We provide you everything, including what to say. All you need is a phone and email.

If you’re interested in making calls with us, please reply to this message with your full name, phone number you’ll be using, town/county, and email address you will use for this effort.

Thank you so much!

Warm regards,

Mark

Mark Pukita
614-499-0599 (c)
[mark@mark4ohio.com](mailto:mark@mark4ohio.com)

Peter, I had to personally reach out to thank you. Since our last message, Emerge supporters like you have really stepped up to help close our fundraising gap. **Now we’re just $1,683 away from hitting our mid-month goal! **
Your support means so much to our team and to the fearless women we recruit and train to run for office at every level. When polls and pundits say women can’t win in the most competitive districts, we show the power of our movement and prove them wrong again and again. **We need to keep going and empower MORE Democratic women to run and win in 2023 and beyond.**
It’s not too late to give and make sure we hit our crucial goal before our mid-month deadline at midnight TONIGHT.**So please, if you haven’t had the chance to give, donate $5 or more now to power our movement forward. Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Emerge2023](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66557698/416748390/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1257-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZDhiNDE5LTY0MjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TX3knZ37_EoqZypMFGLNQa_ZhdW3aIhgjMKWl90eGNE=)** Thank you so much for your support, Diane Le

Peter, at Emerge, we bet on Democratic women and back them up with the tools, training, and support they need to run for office and WIN at every level of our government.
That’s the core of our strategy to change the face of politics, mobilize our communities, and deliver results – from defending access to abortion to protecting our most marginalized neighbors from the GOP’s all-out attacks. **And our winning strategy is working! **
Emerge women achieved a stunning **91 percent win rate** in the spring elections this year. Now, **more than** **100 Emerge women are on the ballot in November, and we need your help to have their backs all the way to Election Day. **
**That’s why we’re asking for your support to raise $10,000 before our mid-month deadline on July 15 to fuel our woman-led movement, shatter glass ceilings, and transform politics for good. So please: **

Emerge’s strategy works because we know that every level of office has a role to play in protecting our rights and achieving a government that reflects ALL our communities. That’s why **our recruitment and training programs empower Democratic women to run at every level, in every state. **
Our alums have already **built** **new Democratic trifectas** in crucial battleground states, **achieved** **majority-women state legislatures** , **stopped a Republican supermajority** , and **sent more trailblazing women to Congress.** But we can’t stop now.
With a rogue Supreme Court and aggressive right-wing lawmakers threatening our rights, our communities, and the future of our democracy, we can’t afford to slow down or take “off years.” **Every election matters, and that’s why we MUST hit our mid-month goal to support bold women candidates on the ballot in 2023 and beyond. But we can’t do this work without supporters like you, Peter. **
**[Please, give $5 or more now – as much as you can spare before our midnight deadline on Saturday – to power Emerge’s women-led movement to transform politics in every state!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66557705/416748397/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1257-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3ZDhiNDE5LTY0MjMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TX3knZ37_EoqZypMFGLNQa_ZhdW3aIhgjMKWl90eGNE=)**

Now we’re just $1,683 away from hitting our mid-month goal! Your support means so much to our team and to the fearless women we recruit and train to run for office at every level. When polls and pundits say women can’t win in the most competitive districts, we show the power of our movement and prove them wrong again and again. We need to keep going and empower MORE Democratic women to run and win in 2023 and beyond. It’s not too late to give and make sure we hit our crucial goal before our mid-month deadline at midnight TONIGHT.So please, if you haven’t had the chance to give, donate $5 or more now to power our movement forward. Here’s the best link to give:= Thank you so much for your support, Diane Le Development Director, Emerge \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team Emerge Date: Thu, Jul 13, 2023 Subject: Election Update for Peter | | | = Peter, at Emerge, we bet on Democratic women and back them up with the tools, training, and support they need to run for office and WIN at every level of our government. That’s the core of our strategy to change the face of politics, mobilize our communities, and deliver results – from defending access to abortion to protecting our most marginalized neighbors from the GOP’s all-out attacks. And our winning strategy is working! Emerge women achieved a stunning 91 percent win rate in the spring elections this year. Now, more than 100 Emerge women are on the ballot in November, and we need your help to have their backs all the way to Election Day. That’s why we’re asking for your support to raise $10,000 before our mid-month deadline on July 15 to fuel our woman-led movement, shatter glass ceilings, and transform politics for good. So please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Emerge’s strategy works because we know that every level of office has a role to play in protecting our rights and achieving a government that reflects ALL our communities. That’s why our recruitment and training programs empower Democratic women to run at every level, in every state. Our alums have already built new Democratic trifectas in crucial battleground states, achieved majority-women state legislatures , stopped a Republican supermajority , and sent more trailblazing women to Congress. But we can’t stop now. With a rogue Supreme Court and aggressive right-wing lawmakers threatening our rights, our communities, and the future of our democracy, we can’t afford to slow down or take “off years.” Every election matters, and that’s why we MUST hit our mid-month goal to support bold women candidates on the ballot in 2023 and beyond. But we can’t do this work without supporters like you, Peter. = Thank you for your support today, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States |

Our massive mid-month deadline is TONIGHT and we haven't raised the money we need to defend the Senate.

McConnell's megadonor machine has already begun hitting Democrats with attack ads -- and I don't want to think about the havoc they'll wreak if they outraise us.

**Two seats are all Republicans need to grind our progress to a _screeching_ halt.**

We simply _CANNOT_ let them outraise us, not with President Biden's bold agenda hanging in the balance. So I'll ask you again:

| | | Hi team, We have our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the quarter tonight at midnight, and we're still short of our goal. Your donation — regardless of the amount — is crucial, and here's why:
1. **When BAFAF succeeds, Alaska succeeds**. We saw this in the 2022 election, when we stopped extremists like Sarah Palin and Kelly Tshibaka from taking power.
2. **When Alaska succeeds, America succeeds.** By curbing extremism locally, we elect sensible leaders who can counter extremist forces in the nation's capital. After four years of Donald Trump, culminating with a violent attack on the U.S. Capitol, we need level-headed individuals representing us.
3. **Unfortunately, the radical factions of the GOP are already outraising us.** We cannot allow them to dominate the national narrative through their massive spending.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: This is up to you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — **we’re still about[$1,250 away from hitting our $15,000 mid-month goal](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35003?refcode=em20230715-3403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3403%2E614464%2EsrNsAf) before midnight tonight.**
If we’re going to keep exposing Josh Hawley as the corrupt, cowardly politician he really is and get Lucas’ unifying message in front of voters ASAP — it’s up to you.
If we’re going to end the filibuster, pass protections for abortion access in all 50 states, and finally give people the freedom to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives — we need your help to do it.
And if we’re going to take advantage of America’s best opportunity to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — your support could make all the difference.
The only way we’ll be able to defeat Josh Hawley and take back this Senate seat for real, everyday Missourians is with help from grassroots supporters just like you, all across the country. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Can you rush a donation of $10 or anything at all toward our $15,000 goal before our deadline at midnight tonight? How we build this movement in the off-year will have a big impact on the results we see on Election Day — and your support right now is the most critical part of that equation.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35003?refcode=em20230715-3403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3403%2E614464%2EsrNsAf)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Closing the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | _**This is our final chance.**_

**[Tonight at MIDNIGHT,](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=987feb967a514da78c3eb06c3c17dcd8&_e=7AUizbW8N2KpdenETH5R2d6CJkyFa5sZXLpWmZgoKvJ4aj26S7vVvqhNEXjzsNqXo0rkOnqko9VH2kCznrvnNTVrzRtRZJ6gPjA4C_GW8kVV6pd9Yan8GBJQZoqjlJAtEZ7NBWkpNyJpRkcUtf4kMLC-81OfV_MuVUBAyjF2znHL20SEuWD2yuiAL9mPCEXHmNwKvwLRANeRMGUzupMuBvFHWa2IdByShbX6JGI-VveKCGJ77X7bmpTZtBq4ld-xaF8lVoCCATt3jRxbxCABH8x5DyjUe5GNqXQf8NDy2dUIlvYskUWPTe6To_MyTbk95dczrtHZf7SB22Z_jWeXYFJRcDas6PnzRcT30owlges%3D) we’re closing the books on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and as we reach the final few hours before this milestone, _I’m incredibly worried._ **
When I first ran for Senate, I won by _less than 1%_ of the vote, and this cycle, it could be even closer.
That means that every single minute and every single dollar counts, and we have absolutely no time to waste.

I’m a small businessman, retired Army Captain, and Afghanistan War Veteran who is of business as usual in Washington, DC — and I know you are too. After a near-death experience serving in Afghanistan, I learned the most important lesson of my life: Now, I know it’s my mission to serve America in a new way: as the NEXT Senator representing the great state of Nevada. Can you make this a reality, Peter? **FLIP NEVADA RED SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: ONE HOUR** Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)
